jobs.title: Software Engineer
jobs.description:
Sobre a vaga

We are seeking a skilled ServiceNow Developer specializing in Strategic Portfolio Management (SPM) to design, develop, and optimize solutions on the ServiceNow platform. The ideal candidate will have deep experience implementing and customizing SPM modules to support portfolio planning, demand management, project execution, and resource management. You will work closely with stakeholders across IT and business teams to deliver scalable solutions that improve visibility, governance, and delivery of strategic initiatives.


Key Responsibilities
  • Design, develop, and configure solutions within the ServiceNow Strategic Portfolio Management (SPM) suite.
  • Implement and customize SPM modules such as Demand Management, Project Portfolio Management (PPM), Resource Management, and Agile Development.
  • Develop workflows, business rules, UI policies, client scripts, and integrations to support portfolio and project management processes.
  • Collaborate with business stakeholders to gather requirements and translate them into scalable ServiceNow solutions.
  • Build dashboards and reports to provide visibility into portfolio performance, resource utilization, and project delivery.
  • Integrate ServiceNow with third-party tools and enterprise systems using REST/SOAP APIs and integration frameworks.
  • Participate in platform upgrades, testing, and deployment activities.
  • Follow ServiceNow best practices and ensure solutions are maintainable, secure, and scalable.
  • Provide technical guidance and documentation for SPM implementations.
  • Support continuous improvement initiatives and optimization of existing SPM capabilities.


Required Qualifications
  • ServiceNow Certified Implementation Specialist – Strategic Portfolio Management (CIS-SPM) certification.
  • 3+ years of ServiceNow development experience.
  • Hands-on experience implementing ServiceNow SPM / PPM modules.
  • Strong knowledge of ServiceNow platform development including:
  • Business Rules
  • Flow Designer / Workflows
  • UI Policies & Client Scripts
  • Script Includes
  • REST/SOAP integrations
  • Experience with Agile, Waterfall, or hybrid project management methodologies.
  • Strong scripting skills (JavaScript within ServiceNow platform).
  • Experience working with stakeholders to translate business requirements into technical solutions.



Preferred Qualifications
  • ServiceNow Certified System Administrator (CSA).
  • ServiceNow Certified Application Developer (CAD).
  • ServiceNow Certified Implementation Specialist – Strategic Portfolio Management (CIS-SPM).
  • ServiceNow Certified Implementation Specialist (CIS).


Key Skills
  • Strategic Portfolio Management expertise
  • ServiceNow platform development
  • Stakeholder communication and requirement analysis
  • Problem solving and solution design
  • Agile delivery environments

jobs.title: Software Engineer, Frontend
jobs.description:
Sobre a vaga

*This role supports US-based remote work, or Palo Alto, CA based hybrid in-office.


We’re looking for Software Engineers to join our team. As part of a cross-functional scrum team you will design and develop new products and features to help clients grow their wealth. In addition to building client facing features leveraging our in-house Design System components, you also work on improving our infrastructure and developer productivity and can have significant impact afforded by our cross-platform collaboration methods.



As a core member of the Frontend team, you will:
  • Collaborate with backend and mobile engineers, designers, and product managers to build new features and enhance existing features
  • Join other web engineers to triage and resolve operational issues, ensuring that mission-critical web systems and services operate smoothly across the web platform
  • Help with web platform infrastructure projects to improve the health and performance of our systems and increase product delivery velocity
  • Participate in recruiting activities such as interviewing
  • Provide mentorship to other engineers on the team


This role could be a fit if you have:
  • 2-5 years in a web-focused engineering role
  • A deep understanding of JavaScript, including standard ES5+, native DOM APIs, and ideally at least one modern front-end framework (React, Vue, Angular, etc)
  • Experience with Ruby on Rails or similar server-side frameworks (such as Express or Django) is a plus
  • Experience working with design to build custom pages and components, with a focus on page speed performance and writing custom CSS to create pages that are responsive across a variety of screen sizes
  • Real passion for working on projects that have a measurable business impact and like working in a fast-paced cross-functional environment
  • Experience with test-driven development, continuous integration, and automated testing
  • You have either a BS or MS in computer science or related field.


Once you join, Wealthfront will:
  • Pair you with a mentor who will guide you through our structured onboarding program
  • Encourage you to work on projects that match your professional goals
  • Support your professional development by providing feedback during weekly 1:1s and our bi-annual reviews
  • Provide autonomy so you can be a happy and successful member of our team



Estimated annual salary range: $140,000 - $185,000 plus equity and a discretionary bonus.


Benefits include medical, vision, dental, 401K plan, generous time off, parental leave, wellness reimbursements, professional development, employee investing discount, and more!


About Wealthfront


Here at Wealthfront, our mission is to create a financial system that favors people, not institutions. We do this by leveraging technology to build powerful, low-cost, and easy-to-use financial products that help modern investors grow and manage their money.


We started with the ambition to transform the investment advisory business. By automating strategies typically reserved for the wealthy, we unlocked access to high quality investment advice for a digitally-native generation that was underserved by traditional institutions. Since then, we've expanded to a full suite of products designed to help our clients turn their savings into long-term wealth, including:


• A Cash Account that, through our partner banks, offers one of the highest annual percentage yields on uninvested cash in the industry, while providing instant and secure access to your money with no account fees and a full suite of checking features.


• A zero-commission Stock Investing Account with 50+ handpicked collections that help DIY investors discover new companies and make smarter investing decisions.


• Multiple automated investing portfolios designed to unlock tax savings through sophisticated strategies like fixed income, tax-loss harvesting, and direct indexing—which we offer at industry-leading low costs and accessible minimums.


Our award-winning products have attracted over 1 million clients who trust us with more than $90 billion of their hard earned savings—and we're far from done. If you’re inspired to help us reshape the financial industry as we create our next chapter, let’s talk!


For more information please visit www.wealthfront.com.We are an equal opportunity employer and value diversity at our company. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, or disability status.



Please review our candidate privacy notice.



Disclosures: All investing involves risk, including the possible loss of principal. Tax-Loss Harvesting benefits vary depending on the client's entire tax and investment profile. Wealthfront doesn’t provide tax advice. The Cash Account is offered by Wealthfront Brokerage LLC (“Wealthfront Brokerage”), Member of FINRA/SIPC. Wealthfront Brokerage is not a bank. We convey funds to partner banks who accept and maintain deposits, provide the variable interest rate, and provide access to FDIC pass-through insurance. Investment management and advisory services–which are not FDIC insured–are provided by Wealthfront Advisers LLC (“Wealthfront Advisers”), an SEC-registered investment adviser. The checking features offered in the Wealthfront Cash Account are provided by Green Dot Bank, Member FDIC. Fees and Eligibility requirements may apply to certain checking features, please see the Deposit Account Agreement for details.



By “award-winning products”, please refer to www.wealthfront.com/reviews for more information. Wealthfront Corporation oversees Total Client Assets and Trusted Clients through Wealthfront Advisers and Wealthfront Brokerage. Wealthfront Advisers and Wealthfront Brokerage are wholly owned subsidiaries of Wealthfront Corporation.

jobs.title: Remote Software Engineer (US)
jobs.description:
Sobre a vaga

About Us:

Based in San Francisco, California, Turing is the world’s leading research accelerator for frontier AI labs and a trusted partner for global enterprises deploying advanced AI systems.


Turing supports customers in two ways: first, by accelerating frontier research with high-quality data, advanced training pipelines, plus top AI researchers who specialize in software engineering, logical reasoning, STEM, multilinguality, multimodality, and agents; and second, by applying that expertise to help enterprises transform AI from proof of concept into proprietary intelligence with systems that perform reliably, deliver measurable impact, and drive lasting results on the P&L.


Project Overview:

As a Software Engineering evaluator, you will create cutting-edge datasets for training, benchmarking, and advancing large language models, collaborating closely with researchers. This includes curating code examples, providing precise solutions, and making corrections in Python, JavaScript (including ReactJS), C/C++, Java, Rust, and Go; evaluating and refining AI-generated code for efficiency, scalability, and reliability; and working with cross-functional teams to enhance enterprise-level AI-driven coding solutions.


What Does a Typical Day Look Like?
  • Working on AI model training initiatives by curating code examples, building solutions, and correcting code in Python, JavaScript (including ReactJS), C/C++, Java, Rust, and Go.
  • Evaluate and refine AI-generated code to ensure that it is efficient, scalable, and reliable.
  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams to enhance AI-driven coding solutions against industry performance benchmarks.
  • Build agents that can verify the quality of the code and identify error patterns.
  • Hypothesize on steps in the software engineering cycle (prototyping, architecture design, API design, production implementation, launch, experiments, monitoring, operational maintenance) and evaluate model capabilities on them
  • Design verification mechanisms that can automatically verify a solution to a software engineering task.


Required Skills:
  • Several years of software engineering experience (+5 years), including 2+ years of continuous full-time experience at a top-tier product company (e.g., Google, Stripe, Amazon, Apple, Meta, Netflix, Microsoft, Datadog, Dropbox, Shopify, PayPal, IBM Research).
  • Strong expertise in building full-stack applications and deploying scalable, production-grade software using modern languages and tools.
  • Deep understanding of software architecture, design, development, debugging, and code quality/review assessment.
  • Excellent oral and written communication skills for clear, structured evaluation rationales.


Engagement Details:

  • Commitment: flexible engagement, minimum 10 hrs/week, up to 40 hrs/week (partial PST overlap required)
  • Type: Contractor (no medical/paid leave)
  • Duration: 1 month (starting next week; potential extensions based on performance and fit)
  • Location: Candidates must be based out of US, Canada or WEU countries (UK, Netherlands, Italy, Germany, …)


Note: As part of assessments you will go through an AI video interview.


After applying, you will receive an email with a login link. Please use that link to access the portal and complete your profile.


Know amazing talent? Refer them at turing.com/referrals, and earn money from your network.

jobs.title: Senior Frontend Engineer / Frontend Architect
jobs.description:
Sobre a vaga

Role Summary


We are hiring a Senior Frontend Engineer / Frontend Architect to lead the design and implementation of our production-grade trading UX for a Liquidity Trading ATS platform with crypto trading capabilities. You will own the frontend architecture, performance, reliability, and user experience for real-time trading workflows, market data, order entry, blotters, positions, risk views, and onboarding flows working closely with backend, product, compliance, and security teams.


Responsibilities
  • Architect and deliver high-performance trading UIs (real-time quotes, order tickets, depth/market data, charts, blotters, positions, balances).
  • Build scalable frontend patterns for low-latency streaming data (WebSockets/SSE), state management, caching, and optimistic UI.
  • Define UI standards for trader-grade usability: keyboard-first workflows, accessibility, error states, resilience, and audit-friendly interactions.
  • Partner with backend teams to define API contracts (REST/gRPC) and real-time event schemas (Kafka/NATS/etc.).
  • Implement frontend observability: performance metrics, error tracking, user journeys, and uptime dashboards.
  • Enforce secure coding practices.
  • Mentor engineers; drive code quality, reviews, and CI/CD.


Required Qualifications
  • 8+ years frontend engineering experience with at least 2+ years in an architecture/tech lead role.
  • Proven experience building trading or market-data heavy web and mobile applications (equities, options, FX, crypto, or ATS/exchange UIs).
  • Expert in modern web frameworks (e.g., React/TypeScript preferred) and component architecture.
  • Hands-on with real-time data patterns: WebSockets, event-driven UI updates, backpressure handling.
  • Strong understanding of frontend performance tuning (render profiling, virtualization, caching, bundle optimization).
  • Experience working in regulated environments (FINRA/SEC/CFTC, SOC2/ISO controls) and building audit-friendly UX.


Domain Requirements (Strongly Preferred)
  • Prior work at or with platforms similar to TD Ameritrade, Robinhood, Coinbase, or comparable brokerages/exchanges/ATS providers.
  • Strong understanding of trading domain concepts: orders, fills, cancels, TIF, order types, positions, margin, fees, and corporate actions.
  • Familiarity with broker-dealer (BD) and transfer agent (TA) operational flows as they relate to customer onboarding, account funding, trade lifecycle, statements, and reconciliation.
  • Ability to propose how the platform should look and feel for professional-grade trading (information architecture, workflows, responsiveness, error handling).


Nice-to-Have
  • Experience with security controls for fintech apps: device binding, MFA, session hardening.
  • Experience building charting/analytics UIs (TradingView integrations or custom charting).
  • Knowledge of blockchain concepts relevant to trading/settlement (wallets, signing flows, chain events).
  • Experience with design systems and accessibility at scale.


What Success Looks Like


A stable, fast, intuitive trading UI that performs under peak load, handles degraded networks gracefully, and supports compliance/audit requirements.

jobs.title: Senior Frontend Engineer / Frontend Architect
jobs.description:
Sobre a vaga

Role Summary


We are hiring a Senior Frontend Engineer / Frontend Architect to lead the design and implementation of our production-grade trading UX for a Liquidity Trading ATS platform with crypto trading capabilities. You will own the frontend architecture, performance, reliability, and user experience for real-time trading workflows, market data, order entry, blotters, positions, risk views, and onboarding flows working closely with backend, product, compliance, and security teams.


Responsibilities
  • Architect and deliver high-performance trading UIs (real-time quotes, order tickets, depth/market data, charts, blotters, positions, balances).
  • Build scalable frontend patterns for low-latency streaming data (WebSockets/SSE), state management, caching, and optimistic UI.
  • Define UI standards for trader-grade usability: keyboard-first workflows, accessibility, error states, resilience, and audit-friendly interactions.
  • Partner with backend teams to define API contracts (REST/gRPC) and real-time event schemas (Kafka/NATS/etc.).
  • Implement frontend observability: performance metrics, error tracking, user journeys, and uptime dashboards.
  • Enforce secure coding practices.
  • Mentor engineers; drive code quality, reviews, and CI/CD.


Required Qualifications
  • 8+ years frontend engineering experience with at least 2+ years in an architecture/tech lead role.
  • Proven experience building trading or market-data heavy web and mobile applications (equities, options, FX, crypto, or ATS/exchange UIs).
  • Expert in modern web frameworks (e.g., React/TypeScript preferred) and component architecture.
  • Hands-on with real-time data patterns: WebSockets, event-driven UI updates, backpressure handling.
  • Strong understanding of frontend performance tuning (render profiling, virtualization, caching, bundle optimization).
  • Experience working in regulated environments (FINRA/SEC/CFTC, SOC2/ISO controls) and building audit-friendly UX.


Domain Requirements (Strongly Preferred)
  • Prior work at or with platforms similar to TD Ameritrade, Robinhood, Coinbase, or comparable brokerages/exchanges/ATS providers.
  • Strong understanding of trading domain concepts: orders, fills, cancels, TIF, order types, positions, margin, fees, and corporate actions.
  • Familiarity with broker-dealer (BD) and transfer agent (TA) operational flows as they relate to customer onboarding, account funding, trade lifecycle, statements, and reconciliation.
  • Ability to propose how the platform should look and feel for professional-grade trading (information architecture, workflows, responsiveness, error handling).


Nice-to-Have
  • Experience with security controls for fintech apps: device binding, MFA, session hardening.
  • Experience building charting/analytics UIs (TradingView integrations or custom charting).
  • Knowledge of blockchain concepts relevant to trading/settlement (wallets, signing flows, chain events).
  • Experience with design systems and accessibility at scale.


What Success Looks Like


A stable, fast, intuitive trading UI that performs under peak load, handles degraded networks gracefully, and supports compliance/audit requirements.

jobs.title: Senior Developer
jobs.description:
Sobre a vaga

This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Senior Developer in United States.

This role is ideal for an experienced developer who thrives on building scalable, high-quality software across full-stack environments. You will lead the design and implementation of features, ensure code quality, and optimize system performance while mentoring junior and mid-level developers. Working with modern frontend frameworks, backend languages, and SQL-based data stores, you will influence architecture and help maintain robust, efficient, and secure systems. The position requires a balance of technical depth, leadership, and collaboration, offering opportunities to shape both development practices and team growth. You will work in a dynamic, mission-driven environment that values innovation, continuous learning, and delivering measurable impact.

Accountabilities

  • Design and implement small-to-medium systems, focusing on clean, scalable, and testable code.
  • Review pull requests and provide constructive feedback to ensure adherence to best practices.
  • Build and maintain RESTful or GraphQL APIs that are intuitive for internal and external use.
  • Identify and resolve performance bottlenecks in backend services, databases, and frontend code.
  • Mentor and coach mid- to junior-level developers, fostering skill development and best practices.
  • Contribute to architecture decisions, system design, and deployment strategies.
  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams to ensure seamless integration, quality, and delivery of software solutions.

Requirements
  • Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science or a related field.
  • 8+ years of experience in software development with full-stack proficiency.
  • Expertise in frontend frameworks such as React, Vue.js , or Angular.
  • Strong backend development experience with Java, JavaScript, Python, or Go.
  • Hands-on experience with SQL databases such as PostgreSQL and understanding of database normalization.
  • Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines, DevOps practices, and debugging production issues.
  • Proficient in writing unit and end-to-end tests to ensure high-quality deliverables.
  • Strong communication and mentorship skills, capable of explaining technical trade-offs and guiding team members.
  • Must be a U.S. citizen and able to obtain or maintain Public Trust (High) clearance.

Benefits
  • Competitive full-time salary with performance-based incentives.
  • Comprehensive medical, vision, and dental insurance coverage.
  • Life and AD&D insurance, along with short- and long-term disability plans.
  • Retirement plan with 401(k) and employer matching contributions.
  • Access to professional development, training, and educational resources.
  • Flexible spending accounts (FSA) and employee assistance programs.
  • Paid holidays and generous PTO to support work-life balance.
  • Employee recognition and referral programs to celebrate contributions.

Why Apply Through Jobgether?

We use an AI-powered matching process to ensure your application is reviewed quickly, objectively, and fairly against the role's core requirements. Our system identifies the top-fitting candidates, and this shortlist is then shared directly with the hiring company. The final decision and next steps (interviews, assessments) are managed by their internal team.

We appreciate your interest and wish you the best!

Why Apply Through Jobgether?

Data Privacy Notice: By submitting your application, you acknowledge that Jobgether will process your personal data to evaluate your candidacy and share relevant information with the hiring employer. This processing is based on legitimate interest and pre-contractual measures under applicable data protection laws (including GDPR). You may exercise your rights (access, rectification, erasure, objection) at any time.

We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

jobs.title: Software Engineer - Remote
jobs.description:
Sobre a vaga

Want to learn more about this role and Jobot? Click our Jobot logo and follow
our LinkedIn page!


Job details:
Transform Health, Extend Life - Work with us to help revolutionize preventive healthcare through data-driven longevity science.

This Jobot Job is hosted by: Chris Gorman
Are you a fit? Easy Apply now by clicking the "Easy Apply" button
and sending us your resume.
Salary: $130,000 - $160,000 per year


A bit about us:

We are a leading science-backed healthcare facility that specializes in providing comprehensive and personalized services aimed at extending lifespan and improving health and well-being. Powered by AI, we add years to lives through personalized health plans and cutting-edge therapeutics.

Due to growth, we are looking to add Software Engineers to our Remote Team!


Why join us?

What We Offer:

  • Competitive base pay and overall compensation package
  • Full benefits: Medical, Dental, Vision
  • Generous PTO, vacation, sick, and holidays
  • Life Insurance coverage
  • 401K


Job Details

Responsibilities:

1. Solution Implementation: Contribute across the entire software stack as needed to maintain and deliver engaging AI-powered user experiences built on web and mobile platforms.
2. Data Engineering Support: Work collaboratively to support the business by creating seamless integrations between the Fountain Life Platform and diverse data vendors, ensuring data consistency, reliability, and security.
3. Code Quality and Best Practices: Provide and receive actionable feedback on pull requests to maintain high-quality, consistent code within the team. Implement automation to ensure a high level of system reliability. Learn and apply software development and project management best practices.
4. Innovative Problem Solving: Actively participate in identifying and solving technical challenges with new technologies and innovative solutions to level up the team.
5. Review, test, and debug team members’ code to ensure optimal functionality.
6. Utilize AI and machine learning technologies to create innovative solutions.
7. Collaborate with internal teams and vendors to fix and improve products.
8. Ensure software is up-to-date with the latest technologies and development trends.

Qualifications:

1. Proven experience as a Software Engineer
2. Experience developing cloud-based applications. AWS experience is preferred.
3. Proficiency in Typescript and Python/Node.
4. Hands-on experience building production applications using LLMs is a bonus.
5. Strong understanding of the software development lifecycle.

Interested in hearing more? Easy Apply now by clicking the "Easy Apply" button.


Want to learn more about this role
and Jobot?
Click our Jobot logo and follow our LinkedIn page!\n

jobs.title: Senior React UI Developer
jobs.description:
Sobre a vaga

Are you a React UI Developer working at a Large Financial Institution and being told by your leadership that you are too hands-on, too detail-oriented, or that you think and work like a start-up?


Imagine working at Intellibus to engineer platforms that impact billions of lives around the world. With your passion and focus, we will accomplish great things together!


We are looking forward to you joining our Platform Engineering Team.


Our Platform Engineering Team is working to solve the Multiplicity Problem. We are trusted by some of the most reputable and established FinTech Firms. Recently, our team has spearheaded the Conversion & Go Live of apps that support the backbone of the Financial Trading Industry.


We are looking for Engineers who can
  • Design and implement robust, scalable, and high-performance architecture for React-based applications.
  • Develop and maintain architecture documentation, guidelines, and best practices.
  • Lead architectural reviews and provide technical oversight to ensure alignment with business goals and technology strategy.
  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams, including designers, backend developers, and product managers, to deliver seamless and user-friendly applications.
  • Write clean, maintainable, and efficient code using React.js and related technologies.
  • Implement state management solutions (e.g., Redux, MobX) and ensure efficient component architecture.
  • Write ReactJS applications in Typescript & JavaScript.
  • Migrate React Components from Class Components to Function Components.
  • Implement Data Caching in a React App.
  • Use React Hooks for In-Component State Management.
  • Use CSS Variables or TailwindCSS to enable dynamic styling.
  • Add a Dark Mode to an Existing React App.
  • Add Internationalization & Localization to an Existing React App.
  • Define Unit, Integration, & E2E Test Structure for a New React App.
  • Add SSR to your ReactJS Apps via NextJS.
  • Deploy & Host a ReactJS App in AWS (Multi-AZ & Multi-Region).
  • Create React Apps which consume REST APIs.
  • Evaluate Pros & Cons of New UI Frameworks (Svelte, SolidJS, Qwik).
  • Use Storybook to Document & Catalog a React UI Component Library.
  • Setup a npm / yarn / pnpm Monorepo for a UI Component Library.
  • Debug React Apps deployed in an AWS Unix Environment (EC2 / ECS / EKS).


We work closely with
  • ReactJS
  • Typescript
  • CSS3
  • HTML5
  • Jest & Enzyme
  • REST APIs
  • AWS

Our Process
  • Schedule a 15 min Video Call with someone from our Team.
  • 4 Proctored GQ Tests (< 2 hours).
  • 30-45 min Final Video Interview.
  • Receive Job Offer.


If you are interested in reaching out to us, please apply, and our team will contact you within the hour.

jobs.title: Adobe InDesign Engineer (Front-End)
jobs.description:
Sobre a vaga

Company Description

VHBD Group, Inc. specializes in more than just staffing solutions. We partner with businesses to address the complexities of delivering successful projects and products that generate customer value. Our team, built on expertise in staffing, project management, and IT support, ensures intentional and informed placements designed to create lasting impact. We pride ourselves on excellence, leveraging a tailored and efficient sourcing model to optimize outcomes for both our clients and talented professionals. At VHBD, our mission is to be a force multiplier, driving forward high-performing teams and successful partnerships.


Role Description

We are partnering with a mid-level regional bank seeking a highly skilled Adobe InDesign Engineer to support the technology infrastructure behind high-impact marketing campaigns. This role is instrumental in building and maintaining the front-end document generation and campaign automation systems that power customer acquisition initiatives—including promotional campaigns such as deposit bonuses (e.g., “Bring $25,000 to open an account and receive $600”). The ideal candidate will combine deep expertise in Adobe InDesign with campaign automation and customer communications platforms, ensuring scalable, compliant, and visually compelling output across digital and print channels.


This is a one-year contract engagement, $80-$85 hour, W2, fully remote within North America (United States, Canada, or Mexico). You will collaborate closely with Marketing, Digital Banking, Compliance, and IT teams to design and engineer personalized customer communication templates and campaign-driven assets that align with regulatory standards and brand guidelines. This is a high-visibility role where precision, performance, and customer experience are critical.


Qualifications
  • Proficiency in Adobe InDesign, along with a strong understanding of creating templates and managing workflows
  • Experience with front-end technologies (e.g., HTML, CSS, and JavaScript) and interactive design
  • Skills in troubleshooting, debugging, and optimizing performance of digital assets
  • Familiarity with cross-functional collaboration between design and development teams
  • Attention to detail and the ability to meet deadlines consistently
  • Strong problem-solving and organizational skills
  • Experience in creating solutions for large-scale or corporate projects (preferred)
  • Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Graphic Design, or related field, or equivalent experience


Key Responsibilities
  • Design, build, and maintain dynamic document templates using Adobe InDesign for marketing and customer communication campaigns
  • Develop and configure automated customer communication workflows within Quadient Inspire (formerly Quadrant Inspire)
  • Engineer front-end template logic and data-driven personalization for promotional banking campaigns
  • Translate marketing requirements into scalable, compliant document generation solutions
  • Integrate campaign logic with internal data sources to dynamically generate customer-facing materials
  • Ensure accuracy and adherence to regulatory and compliance standards for financial promotions
  • Optimize document generation performance, rendering speed, and template maintainability
  • Collaborate cross-functionally with Marketing, Compliance, Product, and IT teams
  • Support testing, QA validation, and deployment of campaign materials
  • Maintain documentation of template structures, personalization rules, and automation workflows
Required Skills & Experience
  • Strong hands-on experience with Adobe InDesign (template creation, scripting, automation)
  • Experience with Quadient Inspire (Quadrant Inspire) for customer communications management
  • Background in front-end template engineering within regulated environments (financial services preferred)
  • Experience supporting marketing campaign execution through document automation platforms
  • Understanding of data-driven personalization and variable content logic
  • Familiarity with compliance-driven document review processes
  • Strong collaboration and communication skills in a remote environment
  • Ability to work within North American time zones

  • Ensure accuracy and adherence to regulatory and compliance standards for financial promotions
  • Optimize document generation performance, rendering speed, and template maintainability
  • Collaborate cross-functionally with Marketing, Compliance, Product, and IT teams
  • Support testing, QA validation, and deployment of campaign materials
  • Maintain documentation of template structures, personalization rules, and automation workflows
Required Skills & Experience
  • Strong hands-on experience with Adobe InDesign (template creation, scripting, automation)
  • Experience with Quadient Inspire (Quadrant Inspire) for customer communications management
  • Background in front-end template engineering within regulated environments (financial services preferred)
  • Experience supporting marketing campaign execution through document automation platforms
  • Understanding of data-driven personalization and variable content logic
  • Familiarity with compliance-driven document review processes
  • Strong collaboration and communication skills in a remote environment
  • Ability to work within North American time zones

jobs.title: Software Engineer
jobs.description:
Sobre a vaga

About Us

At Winaxis, we design and deliver innovative software solutions that empower businesses to scale and succeed. We are seeking a talented Software Engineer to join our growing team and contribute to building high-quality, scalable, and secure applications.

Key Responsibilities

  • Design, develop, test, and deploy software solutions across the full development life cycle.
  • Collaborate with product managers, designers, and other engineers to understand requirements and deliver impactful features.
  • Write clean, efficient, and maintainable code following best practices.
  • Debug, troubleshoot, and optimize existing applications for performance and scalability.
  • Develop and integrate APIs (REST, GraphQL, SOAP) with front-end and back-end systems.
  • Work with relational and non-relational databases to design efficient data models.
  • Participate in code reviews and knowledge-sharing sessions.
  • Stay updated on emerging technologies and recommend solutions that align with business needs.

Required Skills & Qualifications
  • Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or related field (or equivalent work experience).
  • 0–5 years of professional software development experience.
  • Proficiency in at least one programming language (Java, Python, C++, JavaScript, or C#).
  • Strong knowledge of data structures, algorithms, and software design patterns.
  • Experience with front-end (React, Angular, Vue, or similar) and/or back-end frameworks (Spring Boot, Node.js, Django, .NET).
  • Familiarity with databases (SQL – MySQL, PostgreSQL, Oracle; NoSQL – MongoDB, Cassandra).
  • Understanding of version control systems (Git).
  • Knowledge of Agile/Scrum methodologies.

Nice to Have
  • Experience with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP).
  • Familiarity with microservices architecture.
  • Exposure to containerization and orchestration (Docker, Kubernetes).
  • Experience with automated testing and CI/CD pipelines.

What We Offer
  • Competitive salary and benefits package.
  • Opportunities to work on innovative and impactful projects.
  • Collaborative and growth-oriented work culture.
  • Professional development and career advancement support.


Experiência e competências desejadas

python, SQL, R

jobs.title: Next.js Frontend Developer (Contract-to-Hire)
jobs.description:
Sobre a vaga

About Givingli

Givingli is a venture-backed gifting platform backed by Alexis Ohanian and Tobi Lutke. Our iOS app is Apple Editors' Choice and has been named App of the Day 7 times. Our enterprise product (Givingli Pro) powers corporate gifting for companies from startups to Fortune-500.


The Project

As our Pro platform scales and we take on larger enterprise clients, we're building our web frontend for the next chapter. We're migrating to Next.js to deliver a faster, more polished experience for the companies that depend on us. The foundation is already in place. You'll be using Figma, PRDs, and the live site, and our production API to knock out the frontend rebuild. This is a well-scoped, high-velocity build with clear designs, working APIs, and a team that knows exactly what we're shipping.


This starts as a focused 8-12 week contract. For the right person, it leads to a full-time role as we continue to scale the platform.


What You'll Do

• Build screens from Figma designs in Next.js + TypeScript + Tailwind CSS

• Wire screens to existing Rails API endpoints

• Work closely with our lead designer who will QA every screen against Figma

• Use AI tools (Cursor, Claude) to move fast


What We're Looking For

• Strong experience with Next.js, React, TypeScript, and Tailwind

• Experience using AI coding tools like Cursor in your daily workflow

• Sharp eye for matching designs, if it doesn't match Figma, it's not done

• Ability to move fast and communicate clearly

• Bonus: experience with shadcn/ui


This is Not For You If

• You've never used AI coding tools and aren't interested in learning

• You need hand-holding on React fundamentals

• You can't show examples of frontend work you've shipped


To Apply

Send a short message with:

1. A link to something you've built in Next.js

2. What AI tools you use and how they fit into your workflow

3. Your hourly rate and availability to start


We're moving fast. If you're the right fit, we can start this week.

jobs.title: Sr. Application Developer
jobs.description:
Sobre a vaga

Position Overview

GeoMarvel is seeking to expand our development team with passionate JavaScript developers. Qualified candidates will have the opportunity to work with new and emerging technologies in a collaborative and innovative environment, building applications across many disciplines, which often involve both front-end and server-side components.


Roles & Responsibilities
  • Design solutions, writing and testing code, automating testing and deployment
  • Work in collaboration with members of product and design teams
  • Collaborate with partnering technology team members to ensure a seamlessly integrated end-to-end design
  • Enforce existing process guidelines while contributing to new processes, guidelines, team rules and best practices
  • Have an open mindset to working with and picking up new technologies to achieve design, code, testing and deployment tasks
  • Research and learn new methodologies and technologies, to bring new knowledge to the team

    • Required Experience & Technical Skills:
    • 3+ years of software engineering experience with a focus on full-stack web development
    • Expert-level JavaScript framework proficiency with extensive experience in React, Angular, or Vue.js
    • Minimum 1 year of React experience with modern hooks, state management, and component architecture
    • Strong TypeScript proficiency for type-safe, scalable application development
    • 3+ years of API development experience designing, building, and consuming RESTful web services
    • Server-side Node.js expertise for backend development
    • SQL database proficiency with experience in query writing and database design
    • 3+ years of cloud platform experience with major providers (AWS, Azure, or GCP)
    • Modern build tools: Experience with Vite, Parcel, or similar next-generation bundlers
    • Preferred Experience: Geospatial technology: Familiarity with mapping solutions, particularly Esri's ArcGIS platform.
    • Preferred Experience: Demonstrated understanding and application of accessibility standards and regulations (e.g., WCAG 2.1, Section 508, ADA).

    • Benefits
    • Remote work in the United States & Canada
    • Competitive salary
    • Medical, Dental, & Vision Insurance
    • 401K plan with employer match – New in Spring 2024!
    • 10+ Paid Holidays
    • Paid Time Off (PTO)
    • 0-4 years awarded 4 weeks (160 hours) on first day of employment
    • Longer tenure awards additional PTO
    • Annual Performance Bonus
    • Parental Leave
    • Bereavement Leave
    • Expense Reimbursement for company-related travel
    • Conferences, client on-sites, and team gatherings

    • About GeoMarvel

    GeoMarvel is an award-winning geospatial software development, GIS solution service provider, and Esri Gold Tier Business Partner based out of the Washington DC area. We specialize in GIS-focused workforce optimization, cloud infrastructure, data analysis, computation, and custom application & visualization development. GeoMarvel wields over 30 years of industry experience to confidently build scalable infrastructure and software solutions.


    Our portfolio is composed of entities ranging from members of the Fortune 500 list, international non-profits, and disaster relief organizations, to large electric utility companies, local governments, and startups.

jobs.title: Full-Stack Developer - Frontend Focused: React/React Native | Equity-Salary
jobs.description:
Sobre a vaga

Please read the "Note" section below.


Company Overview:


Tribiut is a dynamic tech startup dedicated to driving innovation in the online social landscape. We are revolutionizing the way people think about and access financial services. Monyverse is the first to market with creator-led financial education and virtual account machine-learning technology. Our mission is to create a world where everyone has access to the financial tools, they need to achieve their goals and live their best lives.


Responsibilities:


Develop and maintain scalable and robust backend systems for mobile applications and websites, ensuring high performance and reliability.

Collaborate with front-end developers, mobile app developers, and designers to integrate backend functionality seamlessly into user interfaces.

Design and implement RESTful APIs to facilitate communication between frontend interfaces and backend services.

Optimize database queries and data access methods to improve application performance and responsiveness.

Implement authentication, authorization, and security measures to protect sensitive data and ensure compliance with industry standards.

Monitor server infrastructure, identify potential issues or bottlenecks, and implement solutions to enhance scalability and stability.

Work closely with cross-functional teams to define technical requirements, prioritize tasks, and deliver solutions that meet project deadlines.

Conduct thorough testing, debugging, and troubleshooting to identify and resolve backend issues and ensure the overall quality of the product.

Stay up-to-date with the latest trends, technologies, and best practices in backend development, and make recommendations for continuous improvement.

Collaborate with DevOps and infrastructure teams to deploy and maintain backend services in cloud environments.


Qualifications:


Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field. Master's degree preferred.

Proven experience as a Backend Developer, specifically working on mobile applications and websites.

Strong proficiency in development languages such as Javascript and Typescript.

Experience with frameworks such as Express.js, Next.js, React and React Native

Solid understanding of database management system PostgreSQL.

Proficiency in designing and implementing RESTful APIs.

Experience with AWS cloud platform such as AWS, or Google Cloud Platform, and familiarity with containerization tools like Docker.

Knowledge of authentication and authorization mechanisms such as OAuth, JWT, and session management.


Note:

This is an Equity-first, transitioning to salary. We’re looking for builders who are comfortable for meaningful ownership and the potential upside of a successful startup. It is made for entrepreneurial candidates who want to help build a company rather than just be a standard 9‑to‑5 worker, and who want ownership without the financial risk of doing it on their own. If this arrangement does not fit your goals of success we ask that you please refrain from applying to the role. Application Request: To reduce the spam that we receive, you will be asked to submit a brief 2‑minute video introducing yourself. This helps us confirm you’re a real applicant (not a spam account) and speeds up evaluation.

jobs.title: Full Stack Senior Software Engineer
jobs.description:
Sobre a vaga

About the Company

Aldoa is a modern software company on a mission to transform the engineering services industry. Professional engineers, field & laboratory technicians, and consultants are used to performing mission-critical work on spreadsheets, pen & paper, and decades-old tools - and it’s about time we change that.


The Aldoa platform is purpose-built for geotechnical, environmental, & construction materials testing firms. We help teams capture data in the field, manage projects, stay aligned with industry standards, and generate high-quality technical reports for their clients.


We’re a small but rapidly growing team that values ownership, independence, and growth. Everyone’s contributions are visible, and we’re intentional about providing a clear path forward for career progression.


About the Role

We’re looking for a Senior Software Engineer who thrives at the intersection of product thinking and technical execution. You’ll play a critical role in shaping the architecture, scalability, and product experience of the Aldoa platform. This is not a ticket-driven role — we value engineers who think in systems, challenge assumptions, and translate real customer workflows into thoughtful software.

You should bring strong technical judgment, a high bar for quality, and a bias toward shipping.


What You’ll Do
  • Design, build, and ship full-stack features across our web and mobile applications
  • Make and influence architectural decisions that shape the long-term direction of the platform
  • Partner closely with product and design to translate complex engineering workflows into intuitive user experiences
  • Own features end-to-end, from technical design through deployment and iteration
  • Improve performance, reliability, and scalability of our multi-tenant SaaS infrastructure
  • Contribute to code reviews, technical standards, and engineering best practices
  • Mentor other engineers and elevate the technical bar of the team


What We’re Looking For
  • 5+ years of experience building and shipping production grade web applications
  • Strong experience with full-stack JavaScript/TypeScript systems
  • Experience designing and evolving application architecture in growing systems
  • Demonstrated ownership of major features or product areas
  • Clear and thoughtful communicator (written and verbal)
  • Comfortable operating in a high-autonomy, fast-moving environment
  • Pragmatic and understanding when to build for scale and when to ship quickly


Nice to Have:
  • Experience with multi-tenant SaaS systems
  • Experience working with AWS infrastructure
  • Experience in workflow-heavy or compliance-driven software domains
  • Experience mentoring or leading projects


Tech Stack
  • Node.js / TypeScript
  • React / React Native
  • MongoDB
  • AWS (ECS, Lambda, etc.)
  • Modern AI-assisted tooling (Claude Code)


Compensation & Benefits
  • Competitive salary
  • Meaningful equity ownership
  • Comprehensive health, vision, and dental plans
  • Flexible time off policy
  • High-impact role with real ownership and growth opportunity

jobs.title: Frontend Engineer with Serious Design Chops
jobs.description:
Sobre a vaga

Founded by security engineers from Tesla and Google, ZeroPath finds and fixes software vulnerabilities, helping teams of all sizes secure their products without slowing down.


Instead of relying on rules or pattern-matching, it understands code semantics and reasons about real application behavior. That allows it to detect issues traditional scanners miss – from business logic flaws to authentication bypasses to multi-step attack paths.


ZeroPath unifies SAST, SCA, Secrets, and IaC into one engine that verifies exploitability and generates precise, context-aware patches. Teams get fewer false positives, smaller backlogs, and stronger security with a developer-friendly experience.


We are looking for a frontend engineer who happens to have great taste and be a good designer. Someone who can write clean React and bring a product to life with strong visual instincts. Someone who understands why the right spacing matters and why subtle decisions change how people perceive trust, depth, and speed. BUT ALSO, someone who is a great designer when we need them to be.


You will work directly with the founders. You will ship real product. You will shape the visual identity of a company that is moving fast and has zero interest in doing anything generic.


What you will work on

• Product UI for the ZeroPath platform

• Frontend implementation in React

• Marketing assets for LinkedIn and other channels

• Website layouts and refinements

• Visual identity improvements across all surfaces

• Branded graphics, banners, and digital collateral

• Fast turnaround design tasks when the team needs something polished


What we care about

• You are a strong designer with real taste

• You can write clean frontend code

• You can take vague direction and still deliver something excellent

• You understand typography, spacing, layout, pacing, and hierarchy

• You can work fast without losing quality

• You notice small details that others miss

• You are comfortable moving between product, brand, and marketing

• You want ownership and like working directly with founders


Nice to have

• Security or devtools experience

• Experience creating subtle animations or interactions

• Ability to build out a design system as we grow

• Experience shipping brand creative for LinkedIn or X


Role details

Full time

Remote or Bay Area

Competitive salary and meaningful equity

You will work directly with Etienne, Dean, and Raphael


If this feels like you, reach out. Include a portfolio and examples of things you have actually built or designed. We care about the work more than the resume.

• You can write clean frontend code

• You can take vague direction and still deliver something excellent

• You understand typography, spacing, layout, pacing, and hierarchy

• You can work fast without losing quality

• You notice small details that others miss

• You are comfortable moving between product, brand, and marketing

• You want ownership and like working directly with founders


Nice to have

• Security or devtools experience

• Experience creating subtle animations or interactions

• Ability to build out a design system as we grow

• Experience shipping brand creative for LinkedIn or X


Role details

Full time

Remote or Bay Area

Competitive salary and meaningful equity

You will work directly with Etienne, Dean, and Raphael


If this feels like you, reach out. Include a portfolio and examples of things you have actually built or designed. We care about the work more than the resume.

jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer
jobs.description:
Sobre a vaga

Senior/Staff Software Engineer (Growth) – React / TypeScript

$170k – $250k USD + Equity + Value-add benefits

Remote

Internet Marketplace


As a Senior Software Engineer (Growth), you’ll join a fast-growing bootstrapped startup that’s already profitable and build and evolve the product surfaces that power customer acquisition, activation, and retention across the marketplace.


You’ll focus on implementing and iterating on high-impact growth initiatives—improving conversion, lifecycle engagement, and marketplace outcomes through pragmatic, high-velocity product engineering. This is a software engineering role embedded within a growth surface, not a marketing strategy position.


You’ll report to an engineering leader who was previously a Director of Engineering on one of the most widely used open-source projects in the world. He has built high-performing teams that engineers have followed from company to company. Developer health, technical rigour, and sustainable pace are non-negotiables. The bar is high, but so is the support.


This is a US time zone–aligned remote role. You’ll collaborate closely with Product, Design, and Analytics to ship and measure experiments quickly and safely.


Responsibilities
  • Build and evolve customer-facing product surfaces that directly improve acquisition, activation, and retention metrics.
  • Own growth-related features end-to-end—from scoping and implementation through rollout and iteration—shipping quickly while keeping performance, reliability, and maintainability high.
  • Contribute to experiment implementation, including feature flags, A/B test variants, and regional rollouts, ensuring changes are safe and measurable in production. Instrument tracking and analytics across acquisition and lifecycle surfaces to ensure business impact is clearly measurable.
  • Build and optimize lifecycle flows such as abandon cart, reactivation, and retention journeys.
  • Improve performance, reliability, and SEO foundations across high-traffic public-facing pages.
  • Collaborate closely with Product, Design, QA, and Analytics in a fast-moving environment where experimentation cadence is high and engineering quality must keep up.
  • Contribute to team health through clear communication, thoughtful tradeoffs, and reliable execution across time zones in a distributed team.


Required Skills
  • Strong frontend engineering experience delivering high-impact, customer-facing product work in a fast-moving environment.
  • Deep experience building modern web applications using React and TypeScript; familiarity with GraphQL is helpful.
  • A product-minded approach to implementation and iteration.
  • Solid fundamentals in system design, performance optimization, and API integration.
  • Experience running safe changes in production, including debugging, monitoring, instrumentation, and structured rollout practices.
  • Comfort working with experimentation frameworks, feature flags, or similar systems in production environments.
  • Ability to move quickly while maintaining quality, observability, and operational reliability.
  • Clear, proactive communication in a distributed team, with flexibility across US and EU time zones.
  • Light backend experience (Node/Python is a plus) is helpful; strong engineering fundamentals matter more than perfect stack alignment.


If You Are…
  • A current or former Tech Lead, Staff Engineer, or senior IC who has deliberately chosen to stay/go back to being hands-on rather than move into people management.
  • Someone who has owned meaningful product surfaces before—rebuilding funnels, improving performance, shipping experiments that moved real business metrics.
  • An engineer who believes speed matters, but correctness, developer experience, and long-term maintainability matter more.
  • Comfortable working in a small team of very senior engineers where the expectation is autonomy, clarity, and high standards.
  • Motivated by craft, autonomy, and measurable business impact—not titles or politics.
  • The kind of engineer who appreciates working for a leader who prioritizes developer health, thoughtful architecture, and building teams that people genuinely enjoy being part of.


If you’re looking to work alongside engineers who operate at a high level—and for a manager engineers actively choose to follow—this is the one for you 😀

jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer
jobs.description:
Sobre a vaga

Scion Technology has been engaged to conduct a search for an experienced Senior Full Stack Software Engineer for our client, a rapidly growing & innovative AI startup shaping the future of generative AI technology! This is a full-time, direct hire position open to remote candidates throughout the United States.


POSITION OVERVIEW

You will take ownership of end-to-end development of complex full-stack AI systems, transforming ambiguous product goals into reliable, scalable solutions. You’ll directly influence the core platform architecture, develop innovative generative AI integrations and work closely with cross-functional teams to deliver real-world AI capabilities used by customers.


PERKS
  • Competitive annual salary up to $180k annually (depending on experience) + ESOP
  • Comprehensive medical, dental and vision insurance
  • Work remotely from anywhere in the US with flexible hours that fit your lifestyle
  • Earn meaningful equity in a company projected to scale rapidly
  • Grow your career with clear advancement opportunities and ongoing learning support
  • Play a key role in shaping future AI products that impact real-world applications


RESPONSIBILITIES
  • Design, implement, and maintain full-stack AI solutions using TypeScript, React, Node.js, and relevant frameworks
  • Develop and deploy production-grade generative AI features, including tools, agents, and workflows
  • Collaborate with product, design, and leadership to translate product ideas into scalable engineering solutions
  • Optimize system performance, reliability, and security across distributed, cloud-based environments
  • Contribute to architecture decisions, code reviews, and best practices for building resilient, scalable AI platforms
  • Contribute to internal frameworks, reusable components, and observability tools for AI-tracing and evaluation
  • Own features end-to-end, from requirements gathering through testing, deployment, and iteration


QUALIFICATIONS
  • 6+ years of professional software engineering experience, with a focus on full-stack development
  • Strong proficiency in TypeScript, React, Node.js, Python and cloud-based environments
  • Hands-on experience building AI-powered applications, especially involving LLMs, generative AI, and related tools
  • Familiarity with RAG techniques, embeddings, vector databases, and prompt engineering
  • Experience with orchestration frameworks such as LangChain, LangGraph, or LlamaIndex
  • Strong understanding of distributed systems, observability (e.g., OpenTelemetry), and performance optimization
  • Proven ability to work independently, navigate ambiguity, and deliver high-quality solutions at an enterprise scale
  • Experience with Python for AI workflows preferred
  • Knowledge of AI safety systems, evaluation frameworks or LLM traceability a plus
  • Contributions to open-source AI projects or frameworks preferred
  • Experience with data pipelines, scalable ML infrastructure or database management desired


COMPENSATION & BENEFITS

This full-time position offers an annual base salary up to $180k, commensurate with experience. The organization provides a robust benefits package that includes comprehensive medical, dental, and vision coverage in addition to unlimited PTO & ESOP.


ABOUT OUR FIRM

Scion Staffing is a national award-winning staffing firm! Since 2006, we have had the pleasure of successfully placing thousands of talented professionals with amazing career opportunities. Through our innovative team building and recruiting solutions, we bridge the gap in executive leadership searches, direct hire recruiting, interim leadership placement, and temporary professional staffing. We are proud to be part of the Forbes lists of the Best Recruitment Firms and the Best Executive Search Firms in America. Additionally, Scion has been recognized as a ClearlyRated Best of Staffing firm as well as a top recruitment firm by The Business Times. Additional information about our firm can also be found online.


Scion Staffing, Inc. is an equal opportunity employer and service provider and does not discriminate based on race, religion, gender, gender identity, national origin, citizenship status, sexual orientation, disability, political affiliation or belief, or any other protected class. We are committed to the principles of Equal Opportunity Employment and are dedicated to making employment decisions based on merit and value, for ourselves, our client companies, and the candidates we represent. For opportunities located in a region that have enacted fair chance, arrest or conviction-based employment ordinances, Scion Staffing proactively follows the enacted guidance and considers for employment all qualified applications with arrest and conviction records. We engage in socially conscious business practices and believe that diverse, inclusive, and non-biased talent and recruitment processes are foundational to the success of Scion as well as every client organization with whom we partner.

jobs.title: Full Stack Developer
jobs.description:
Sobre a vaga

About us

LifeMD is a leading digital healthcare company committed to expanding access to virtual care, pharmacy services, and diagnostics by making them more affordable and convenient for all. Focused on both treatment and prevention, our unique care model is designed to optimize the patient experience and improve outcomes across more than 200 health concerns.

To support our expanding patient base, LifeMD leverages a vertically-integrated, proprietary digital care platform, a 50-state affiliated medical group, a 22,500-square-foot affiliated pharmacy, and a U.S.-based patient care center. Our company — with offices in New York City; Greenville, SC; and Huntington Beach, CA — is powered by a dynamic team of passionate professionals. From clinicians and technologists to creatives and analysts, we're united by a shared mission to revolutionize healthcare. Employees enjoy a collaborative and inclusive work environment, hybrid work culture, and numerous opportunities for growth. Want your work to matter? Join us in building a future of accessible, innovative, and compassionate care.

About the role

We are seeking a Full Stack Developer to join the Pharmacy Technology team, where you will play a key role in designing, building, and scaling high-impact web applications that directly support patient health outcomes.

This role is ideal for a product-focused engineer with a strong foundation in modern front-end frameworks (React), experience working with PHP, Laravel, Tailwind, and MySQL. We are looking for a candidate who enjoys tackling complex problems and breaking them down into clear, practical solutions. You should be adaptable, comfortable in a fast-paced environment, and easy to work with as you will collaborate closely with product, design, non-technical staff, and engineering teammates. The role involves integrating with external services and APIs, contributing to code quality, performance, and maintainability, and continuously improving how the team builds software. Experience in health-tech or pharmacy-related systems is a plus.

Responsibilities:
  • Write maintainable, well-tested code and help uphold coding standards and best practices
  • Work closely with engineers on other teams and projects whose systems interact with this platform to coordinate changes and integrations.
  • Design, maintain, and evolve database schemas; write efficient, reliable queries; and ensure data integrity and performance.
  • Help identify and drive incremental improvements to the platform's reliability, performance, and overall quality.
  • Keep an eye on platform health through metrics, logs, and monitoring tools (e.g., Datadog), and assist in diagnosing and resolving issues.
  • Stay informed on health-tech developments such as interoperability standards, drug databases, and industry platforms, and apply best practices where relevant.
  • Engage with non-technical and healthcare partners to clarify requirements and deliver thoughtful, practical software solutions.
  • Follow established SDLC processes and compliance requirements throughout design, development, testing, and deployment.


Requirements
  • Solid experience building and maintaining web applications using React on the front end and PHP (Laravel) with MySQL on the back end.
  • Experience working with external APIs and third-party services.
  • Strong communication skills, with the ability to collaborate effectively with both technical and non-technical stakeholders.
  • Experience working in the health-tech, pharmacy, or other regulated industries a plus
  • Communicates clearly and respectfully, and is approachable and easy to work with in a collaborative team environment.

Benefits
  • Salary Range: $140,000-$160,000
  • Health Care Plan (Medical, Dental & Vision)
  • Retirement Plan (Roth 401k)
  • Life Insurance (Basic, Voluntary & AD&D)
  • Unlimited PTO Policy
  • Paid Holidays
  • Short Term Disability

jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer
jobs.description:
Sobre a vaga

About the Company


Skills Alliance is partnered with a growing biotech startup that has developed a novel immune profiling platform to turn high-dimensional data into actionable insights.


This client has created AI-first technology to provide high-resolution understandings of the immune system to fully unlock its power, thus allowing for the development of revolutionary products that have a positive impact on patients' lives.


About the Role


Right now, they are looking for a fully remote, Senior Front End Engineer with proven experience in React to help build and optimize front-end user experiences, both from a functional and an aesthetic standpoint. See below for more details:


Responsibilities
  • Architect and build high-performing, superlative front-end experiences that are both functionally and aesthetically pleasing to use on a cloud based platform.
  • Solve complex problems like optimizing React rendering to 60 frames per second, managing WebSocket connections for the replication of real time states from the server, or managing a UI for complex and multi-dimensional data wrangling.
  • Collaborate with cross functional teams, including UX/UI designers, Engineers, Product Managers, Scientists, and other team members to understand requirements to develop new product features.
  • Set foundations both in code and documentation for the front-end to enable future builders to onboard rapidly.
  • Integrate frontend components with backend APIs and services to enable seamless data exchange.
  • Write tests, perform debugging, and troubleshoot to ensure code quality and reliability.
  • Collaborate with PMs and designers to provide input on feasibility and technical considerations during product design process.
  • Participate in code reviews and provide constructive feedback to maintain code quality and consistency.
  • Keep up-to-date with frontend development trends, best practices, and emerging technologies.


Qualifications
  • 4+ years as a front-end software engineer developing user interfaces and managing frontend codebases. Full stack experience is acceptable.
  • Proficiency in Javascript, HTML, CSS, and current front-end frameworks, most notably React.
  • Knowledge of UI/UX principles and ability to collaborate effectively with designers to create visually appealing and intuitive interfaces.
  • Understanding of RESTful APIs and experience in integrating front-end applications with back-end services.
  • Proficient in using browser development tools for debugging and performance optimization.
  • Awareness of web security principles and best practices, including handling user input and protecting against common vulnerabilities.
  • Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail for debugging and troubleshooting frontend issues.
  • Effective communication and collaboration skills to work with cross functional teams and stakeholders, including UI/UX designers, product managers, engineers.

jobs.title: Full Stack Engineer
jobs.description:
Sobre a vaga

TITLE: Fullstack Engineer (Golang)

LOCATION: Atlanta, GA (Brookhaven area)

ANTICIPATED DURATION: Fulltime/ Direct Hire

Responsibilities:
  • Design, architect, and develop software solutions, ensuring scalability, reliability, and performance.
  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams, including product managers, designers, and other engineers, to define project requirements and deliver high-quality solutions.
  • Conduct code reviews and provide technical guidance to improve code quality and maintainability.
  • Help to ensure technical excellence and best practices in software development, including coding standards, design patterns, testing methodologies, and CI/CD processes.
  • Architect and implement systems, considering factors such as scalability, security, and maintainability.
  • Investigate and resolve technical issues, identify root causes, and implement effective solutions.
  • Stay updated with emerging technologies, industry trends, and best practices in software development.
  • Collaborate with stakeholders to execute technical roadmaps, help prioritize initiatives, and deliver business value.

Requirements:
  • 3+ years of hands-on experience in software development, with expertise in one or more programming languages such as Golang, Node.js, TypeScript, React.js, and Next.js.
  • Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or related field.
  • Understanding of software architecture, design patterns, data structures, and algorithms.
  • Experience with cloud platforms (e.g., AWS, Azure, Google Cloud) and microservices architecture.
  • Knowledge of database systems (SQL and NoSQL) and data modeling.
  • Excellent problem-solving skills, critical thinking, and attention to detail.
  • Good communication and collaboration skills, with the ability to work effectively in a team environment and influence technical decisions.

Preferred Experience:
  • Experience with DevOps practices, infrastructure as code (IaC), and automated deployment tools (e.g., Terraform, Ansible, Jenkins).
  • Exposure to A/B testing tools and constructing experiments.
  • Knowledge of containerization technologies (e.g., Docker, Kubernetes) and serverless computing.
  • Experience in performance optimization, profiling, and tuning of software applications.
  • Certifications in relevant technologies (e.g., AWS Certified Solutions Architect, Google Cloud Professional Architect).

The salary range for this position is $145,000-$150,000 (dependent on factors including but not limited to client requirements, experience, statutory considerations, and location). Benefits available to full-time employees: medical, dental, vision, disability, life insurance, 401k and commuter benefits.

Synergis is proud to be an Equal Opportunity Employer. We value diversity and do not discriminate on the basis of race, color, ethnicity, national origin, religion, age, gender, gender identity, political affiliation, sexual orientation, marital status, disability, military/veteran status, or any other status protected by applicable law.

Qualified applicants with arrest or conviction records will be considered for employment in accordance with the requirements of applicable state and local laws, including but not limited to, the San Francisco Fair Chance Ordinance, the City of Los Angeles’ Fair Chance Initiative for Hiring Ordinance, the Los Angeles County Fair Chance Ordinance for Employers, and the California Fair Chance Act.

For immediate consideration, please forward your resume to rcook@synergishr.com

If you require assistance or an accommodation in the application or employment process, please contact us at rcook@synergishr.com

Synergis is a workforce solutions partner serving thousands of businesses and job seekers nationwide. Our digital world has accelerated the need for businesses to build IT ecosystems that enable growth and innovation along with enhancing the Total Experience (TX). Synergis partners with our clients at the intersection of talent and transformation to scale their balanced teams of tech, digital and creative professionals. Learn more about Synergis at www.synergishr.com.

Responsibilities:

  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams, including product managers, designers, and other engineers, to define project requirements and deliver high-quality solutions.
  • Conduct code reviews and provide technical guidance to improve code quality and maintainability.
  • Help to ensure technical excellence and best practices in software development, including coding standards, design patterns, testing methodologies, and CI/CD processes.
  • Architect and implement systems, considering factors such as scalability, security, and maintainability.
  • Investigate and resolve technical issues, identify root causes, and implement effective solutions.
  • Stay updated with emerging technologies, industry trends, and best practices in software development.
  • Collaborate with stakeholders to execute technical roadmaps, help prioritize initiatives, and deliver business value.

Requirements:
  • 3+ years of hands-on experience in software development, with expertise in one or more programming languages such as Golang, Node.js, TypeScript, React.js, and Next.js.
  • Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or related field.
  • Understanding of software architecture, design patterns, data structures, and algorithms.
  • Experience with cloud platforms (e.g., AWS, Azure, Google Cloud) and microservices architecture.
  • Knowledge of database systems (SQL and NoSQL) and data modeling.
  • Excellent problem-solving skills, critical thinking, and attention to detail.
  • Good communication and collaboration skills, with the ability to work effectively in a team environment and influence technical decisions.

Preferred Experience:
  • Experience with DevOps practices, infrastructure as code (IaC), and automated deployment tools (e.g., Terraform, Ansible, Jenkins).
  • Exposure to A/B testing tools and constructing experiments.
  • Knowledge of containerization technologies (e.g., Docker, Kubernetes) and serverless computing.
  • Experience in performance optimization, profiling, and tuning of software applications.
  • Certifications in relevant technologies (e.g., AWS Certified Solutions Architect, Google Cloud Professional Architect).

The salary range for this position is $145,000-$150,000 (dependent on factors including but not limited to client requirements, experience, statutory considerations, and location). Benefits available to full-time employees: medical, dental, vision, disability, life insurance, 401k and commuter benefits.

Synergis is proud to be an Equal Opportunity Employer. We value diversity and do not discriminate on the basis of race, color, ethnicity, national origin, religion, age, gender, gender identity, political affiliation, sexual orientation, marital status, disability, military/veteran status, or any other status protected by applicable law.

Qualified applicants with arrest or conviction records will be considered for employment in accordance with the requirements of applicable state and local laws, including but not limited to, the San Francisco Fair Chance Ordinance, the City of Los Angeles’ Fair Chance Initiative for Hiring Ordinance, the Los Angeles County Fair Chance Ordinance for Employers, and the California Fair Chance Act.

For immediate consideration, please forward your resume to rcook@synergishr.com

If you require assistance or an accommodation in the application or employment process, please contact us at rcook@synergishr.com

Synergis is a workforce solutions partner serving thousands of businesses and job seekers nationwide. Our digital world has accelerated the need for businesses to build IT ecosystems that enable growth and innovation along with enhancing the Total Experience (TX). Synergis partners with our clients at the intersection of talent and transformation to scale their balanced teams of tech, digital and creative professionals. Learn more about Synergis at www.synergishr.com.

jobs.title: Full Stack Engineer
jobs.description:
Sobre a vaga

AEP Hawaii is working with $40M+ funding, remote-first startup (YC-backed) on a mission to automate the mortgage industry. Today, originating a home loan is slow, unstable, and incredibly expensive, costing lenders over $11,000 per loan. We’re changing that by building the next generation of AI-native infrastructure to fully automate the process.


We’ve already powered over $85B in home loans, and we’re looking for Senior Software Engineers who want to ship code to production on day one.


What we’re looking for:
  • The "Builder" Mindset: You don't just ship features; you architect systems and set engineering standards.
  • Tech Stack: Deep expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, React, GraphQL, and AWS.
  • Experience: Ideally 5+ years, but we value talent over tenure. (New grads/early-career must have a "founder" track record or exceptional GitHub).
  • Impact: You’ll lead mission-critical projects like building multi-step AI agents and scaling job-processing infrastructure.


Why join us?
  • High Velocity: We’ve invested heavily in DX with end-to-end type safety and reproducible staging environments.
  • Remote-First: Work from anywhere in the U.S.
  • Compensation: Competitive salary ($150K - $300K) + equity + visa sponsorship available.
