jobs.title: Full Stack Developer (AI / Web3) – Remote
jobs.description:
Sobre a vaga

About InTym Labs:

At InTym Labs, we’re building next-generation autonomous systems and agent-driven infrastructure. Our mission is to empower developers and businesses to create modular, interacting programs that operate seamlessly across distributed and parallel environments.


What You’ll Do:
  • Design, develop, and deploy full-stack web applications and microservices that integrate with decentralized systems.
  • Work on smart-agent frameworks, REST APIs, and real-time messaging pipelines.
  • Build intuitive frontend interfaces (React/Next.js) and connect them to backend systems (Node.js, Rust, Go).
  • Collaborate with product and AI teams to integrate ML/AI-driven automation features.
  • Contribute to open-source projects and modular frameworks, including deployment scripts and developer SDKs.
  • Optimize system performance, reliability, and scalability for testnet and mainnet-ready deployments.


What We’re Looking For:
  • 3+ years experience in full-stack development (React, Node.js, or equivalent).
  • Familiarity with Rust, WASM, or blockchain smart contracts is a plus but not required.
  • Experience with asynchronous messaging, microservices, or event-driven architectures.
  • Strong problem-solving skills, attention to detail, and ability to work in a fast-paced startup environment.
  • Self-starter attitude; comfortable working remotely and collaborating across time zones.


Why You’ll Love Working Here:
  • Work on bleeding-edge AI + Web3 projects that are reshaping autonomous software.
  • Fully remote, flexible hours, and a team-first culture.
  • Opportunity to contribute to open-source frameworks used by developers globally.
  • Competitive compensation + potential equity options.


Bonus Points:
  • Exposure to Ethereum/WASM ecosystems, actor-based architectures.
  • Prior startup experience.
  • Interest in decentralized, multi-agent systems.


How to Apply:Submit your resume and GitHub/portfolio links to hello@intym.xyz and complete the following actions:
  • Star our GitHub repo: https://github.com/TheQuantumChronicle/cap402
  • Register a test agent on "molt.productions" and submit a screenshot or agent ID
  • Follow @InTymLabs on X and include a screenshot


Optional: Follow our LinkedIn page + DM interest or share a project post.

**Benefits:
  • Confirms technical engagement (Molt agent registration)
  • Confirms social engagement with the brand (GitHub star, X follow)
  • Filters for self-starters and hands-on applicants
Applications missing these steps will not be considered.

jobs.title: Full Stack Engineer
jobs.description:
Sobre a vaga

TL;DR

We're looking for a strong full-stack engineer to own the web platform end-to-end, from the UI down to the infrastructure. You'll shape the core product experience for both brands and creators.


Why Fluencify?

Creator marketing is broken. Brands spend months coordinating campaigns through spreadsheets and DMs. Creators wait weeks to get paid. We're fixing that — building the platform that makes it effortless to launch campaigns, get authentic content, and pay creators instantly.


We're a small team with strong fundamentals, real traction, and a lot of ground left to take. If you want high ownership and the chance to meaningfully shape a product people love using, this is the place.


What you'll do:

• Own the full stack — React frontend, Convex backend, infrastructure, and everything in between

• Build features that brands and creators interact with every day

• Architect systems that are reliable at scale without being over-engineered

• Integrate and maintain the services that power payments, auth, storage, and email

• Improve the tools and workflows that make the team faster


What we're looking for:

• 3+ years shipping full-stack products in production

• Strong TypeScript and React fundamentals

• Comfort owning systems end-to-end: design, build, deploy, iterate

• Good product intuition — you think about users, not just code

• Experience with serverless backends and real-time data is a plus

jobs.title: Full Stack Mobile Engineer
jobs.description:
Sobre a vaga

Full Stack Mobile Engineer (Part-Time | Equity)


Location: Remote

Compensation: Equity (Salary Post-Fundraising)

We’re looking for a Full Stack Engineer to accelerate development of our AI-driven self-discovery app and the APIs that power it. This is a part-time, hands-on role where you’ll build the foundation that enables secure, responsive, and personalized experiences across mobile platforms, helping users stop spiraling and gain clarity.

About Plurawl

Plurawl (Techstars 2025) is on a mission to change how people access mental health support globally. We built an app that uses AI to help people stop jumping to conclusions, process their thoughts, and find clarity in moments of anxiety, overthinking, and self-doubt.

In a world where 80% of our thoughts are negative, and 95% are repetitive, Plurawl offers a simple, safe space to break that cycle. And it's working: with over 1K users, our users spend an average of one hour per session, with many making Plurawl part of their weekly routine. We’re already seeing real impact: helping people manage anxiety, overcome substance abuse, and even navigate self-harming ideations.


We’ve been featured in the press (see coverage) and backed by Techstars. But we’re just getting started.


If you care about thoughtful UI, clean animations, and building something that feels as good as it works, this role is for you.

What You’ll Do
  • Own the Full Stack: Build and maintain features across both the front end (React Native) and back end (Node.js) of our mobile app.
  • Create Emotionally Intuitive Interfaces: Build engaging and emotionally resonant user experiences, with thoughtful animations and smooth UI/UX flows.
  • Design Scalable Systems: Build and secure REST APIs that power key product features, from AI journaling tools to real-time progress tracking.
  • Support Mobile Releases: Manage deployment pipelines and submissions for both iOS and Android, ensuring reliable updates and minimal downtime.
  • Integrate Third-Party Tools: Work with APIs like OpenAI, Twilio, and AWS to bring new capabilities to life.
  • Test and Ship with Confidence: Write unit and integration tests to support performance, reliability, and scale. Help maintain a lightweight CI/CD workflow with GitHub Actions.
  • Monitor Bugs and Performance: Use Sentry for crash reporting and Mixpanel to understand user behavior and improve retention.
  • Collaborate Across Functions: Work directly with the CEO, Designer, and Fractional CTO to align product, user, and technical goals. Your input helps shape what we build and how we build it.
  • Move Fast, Stay Stable: Use modern dev tools like GitHub Copilot, and Cursor to accelerate execution without sacrificing quality.

What You Bring
  • Advanced experience with React Native (iOS & Android) and Node.js
  • Proficiency with TypeScript, REST API design, and state management libraries (Context, Redux, or Zustand)
  • Strong experience with Mixpanel and event-based analytics implementation
  • Familiarity with Sentry for error monitoring and debugging
  • Experience building and integrating third-party APIs (e.g., OpenAI, Twilio)
  • Solid understanding of CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions preferred) and version control workflows
  • Bonus: Experience working in privacy-first or HIPAA-compliant systems
  • A mission-driven mindset: you’re excited to build tools that support mental and emotional well-being
  • A builder’s mindset: willing to experiment, move fast, and iterate
  • Deep interest in mental health, behavior change, or creating emotionally impactful products


Why Join Plurawl?
  • Impact: You’ll build tech that’s already helping people with anxiety, overthinking, substance abuse, and more; and we’re just getting started.
  • Ownership: Equity stake in a company poised for growth, with a clear path to a senior leadership role.
  • Traction: Backed by Techstars, active user base with deep engagement (1-hour average sessions), and strong momentum towards revenue through B2B partnerships.
  • Culture: We’re a small, mission-driven team that believes in flexibility, innovation, and building products that feel human, not clinical. We use AI strategically, stay lean, and care deeply about changing how people access mental health support.
  • Growth: As we hit milestones, you’ll have the opportunity to go full-time with compensation and lead the expansion of our engineering team.
  • Flexibility: Work remotely, set your hours, and be part of a company that values outcomes over clock-watching.


We Will Change the Way People Access Mental Health Support Globally.

jobs.title: Full Stack Mobile Engineer
jobs.description:
Sobre a vaga

Full Stack Mobile Engineer (Part-Time | Equity)


Location: Remote

Compensation: Equity (Salary Post-Fundraising)

We’re looking for a Full Stack Engineer to accelerate development of our AI-driven self-discovery app and the APIs that power it. This is a part-time, hands-on role where you’ll build the foundation that enables secure, responsive, and personalized experiences across mobile platforms, helping users stop spiraling and gain clarity.

About Plurawl

Plurawl (Techstars 2025) is on a mission to change how people access mental health support globally. We built an app that uses AI to help people stop jumping to conclusions, process their thoughts, and find clarity in moments of anxiety, overthinking, and self-doubt.

In a world where 80% of our thoughts are negative, and 95% are repetitive, Plurawl offers a simple, safe space to break that cycle. And it's working: with over 1K users, our users spend an average of one hour per session, with many making Plurawl part of their weekly routine. We’re already seeing real impact: helping people manage anxiety, overcome substance abuse, and even navigate self-harming ideations.


We’ve been featured in the press (see coverage) and backed by Techstars. But we’re just getting started.


If you care about thoughtful UI, clean animations, and building something that feels as good as it works, this role is for you.

What You’ll Do
  • Own the Full Stack: Build and maintain features across both the front end (React Native) and back end (Node.js) of our mobile app.
  • Create Emotionally Intuitive Interfaces: Build engaging and emotionally resonant user experiences, with thoughtful animations and smooth UI/UX flows.
  • Design Scalable Systems: Build and secure REST APIs that power key product features, from AI journaling tools to real-time progress tracking.
  • Support Mobile Releases: Manage deployment pipelines and submissions for both iOS and Android, ensuring reliable updates and minimal downtime.
  • Integrate Third-Party Tools: Work with APIs like OpenAI, Twilio, and AWS to bring new capabilities to life.
  • Test and Ship with Confidence: Write unit and integration tests to support performance, reliability, and scale. Help maintain a lightweight CI/CD workflow with GitHub Actions.
  • Monitor Bugs and Performance: Use Sentry for crash reporting and Mixpanel to understand user behavior and improve retention.
  • Collaborate Across Functions: Work directly with the CEO, Designer, and Fractional CTO to align product, user, and technical goals. Your input helps shape what we build and how we build it.
  • Move Fast, Stay Stable: Use modern dev tools like GitHub Copilot, and Cursor to accelerate execution without sacrificing quality.

What You Bring
  • Advanced experience with React Native (iOS & Android) and Node.js
  • Proficiency with TypeScript, REST API design, and state management libraries (Context, Redux, or Zustand)
  • Strong experience with Mixpanel and event-based analytics implementation
  • Familiarity with Sentry for error monitoring and debugging
  • Experience building and integrating third-party APIs (e.g., OpenAI, Twilio)
  • Solid understanding of CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions preferred) and version control workflows
  • Bonus: Experience working in privacy-first or HIPAA-compliant systems
  • A mission-driven mindset: you’re excited to build tools that support mental and emotional well-being
  • A builder’s mindset: willing to experiment, move fast, and iterate
  • Deep interest in mental health, behavior change, or creating emotionally impactful products


Why Join Plurawl?
  • Impact: You’ll build tech that’s already helping people with anxiety, overthinking, substance abuse, and more; and we’re just getting started.
  • Ownership: Equity stake in a company poised for growth, with a clear path to a senior leadership role.
  • Traction: Backed by Techstars, active user base with deep engagement (1-hour average sessions), and strong momentum towards revenue through B2B partnerships.
  • Culture: We’re a small, mission-driven team that believes in flexibility, innovation, and building products that feel human, not clinical. We use AI strategically, stay lean, and care deeply about changing how people access mental health support.
  • Growth: As we hit milestones, you’ll have the opportunity to go full-time with compensation and lead the expansion of our engineering team.
  • Flexibility: Work remotely, set your hours, and be part of a company that values outcomes over clock-watching.


We Will Change the Way People Access Mental Health Support Globally.

jobs.title: Staff Engineer (SF, Remote)
jobs.description:
Sobre a vaga

Caddie is hiring on behalf of a venture-backed AI startup building digital workers for financial compliance teams.


This is a fully remote role open to candidates based in the San Francisco, CA.


Our client builds AI-powered digital workers that help banks and fintechs automate compliance workflows. Their product investigates alerts, reviews customers and transactions, and generates audit-ready narratives so compliance teams can move faster with significantly less manual effort.

The founding team has previously built and exited companies, with over $300M in collective value creation. The company has raised $6.2M in seed funding and is scaling the team from 8 to 15. Investors include top-tier venture firms focused on fintech and AI.


This is a core product engineering role with high ownership and direct exposure to the founders. You’ll ship quickly to production and build software used by leading banks and fintechs.


Staff Engineer

Location: SF Remote (United States)

Compensation: $200,000 – $350,000 USD base salary

Equity: $600,000 – $1,000,000 USD (equity value)


What You’ll Do
  • Own large portions of the product end-to-end
  • Integrate with external data providers and systems
  • Build AI agents that interact with customers and internal workflows
  • Ship new features daily using Python
  • Make fast, high-impact technical decisions in an early-stage environment
  • Take calculated risks and iterate quickly
  • Work closely with founders on architecture and product direction


What We’re Looking For
  • Exceptional proficiency building full-stack products
  • Strong judgment and pragmatism when building in early-stage companies
  • Deep interest in LLMs and rapidly evolving AI capabilities
  • Curiosity about customer problems and how to solve them with software
  • Strong sense of ownership, urgency, and agency
  • Comfort operating with limited structure and high autonomy


What’s Offered
  • $200k–$350k USD base salary
  • $600k–$1M USD equity
  • 100% covered Health, Vision, and Dental benefits
  • Visa sponsorship available for exceptional candidates

jobs.title: Sr. Shopify Web Developer
jobs.description:
Sobre a vaga

Location: Remote | Reports to: Sr. Director of eCommerce & CRM | Type: Full-Time


About Kombo Ventures & Glamnetic

Kombo Ventures is a diversified holding company focused on launching, operating, and investing in consumer brands, technology, and entertainment. Kombo has co-founded two consumer beauty brands (Glamnetic and INH Hair) which have collectively generated hundreds of millions of dollars in revenue over the last 7 years.


Glamnetic is an innovative beauty brand known for disrupting the industry with its revolutionary magnetic lashes & salon-quality press-on nails. Now the #1 press-on nail brand in North America, Glamnetic is sold online and in top retailers Ulta, Sephora, and Amazon. We simplify everyday beauty routines with innovative, trend-forward products that save time, money, and effort — without compromising on quality. We are committed to delivering outstanding customer experiences and fostering a supportive, collaborative & growth-oriented work culture for our team.


Role Description

As our Sr. Web Developer, you’ll own the technical development and optimization of our Glamnetic Shopify storefronts (US and UK) while leading and mentoring a team of two junior developers. You’ll collaborate closely with the marketing, design, and E-commerce teams to build high-converting, performant, and visually compelling shopping experiences. This role blends deep Shopify expertise with strong front-end development skills, people management, and a passion for e-commerce innovation.


Team Leadership & Management
  • Directly manage, mentor, and develop a team of two junior web developers, fostering their technical growth and career progression
  • Conduct regular 1:1s, set clear goals and expectations, and provide constructive feedback through formal and informal performance reviews
  • Plan and delegate work across the team, balancing workloads while ensuring high-quality output and on-time delivery
  • Establish and maintain development standards, code review processes, and documentation practices for the team
  • Lead technical decision-making and architecture discussions, helping junior developers understand the “why” behind implementation choices
  • Create a supportive team culture that encourages questions, experimentation, and continuous learning


Technical Responsibilities

  • Build, maintain, and optimize custom Shopify themes using Liquid, HTML, CSS, and JavaScript across our US and UK storefronts
  • Develop and implement custom Shopify sections, blocks, and metafield-driven templates that empower the marketing team to manage content independently
  • Collaborate with the E-commerce team to implement A/B tests, conversion experiments, and checkout optimizations
  • Integrate and troubleshoot third-party apps and tools (e.g., Rebuy, Klaviyo, Google Tag Manager, GA4, Judge.me, Gorgias)
  • Ensure site performance, Core Web Vitals, and page speed remain best-in-class through code optimization, lazy loading, and asset management
  • Implement structured data / schema markup for SEO and emerging AI discoverability (e.g., llms.txt, product JSON-LD)
  • Using LLMs/AI to automate internal cross-departmental tasks and pull data from different sources using MCP’s
  • Own the technical execution of new product launches, landing pages, and promotional campaigns on tight timelines
  • Comfortable using metrics to inform site strategy on SEO/GEO, Page speed, and decision making
  • Debug and resolve cross-browser, cross-device, and platform-specific issues
  • Manage version control (Git) and maintain clean, well-documented codebases
  • Stay current with Shopify platform updates, new APIs, and evolving e-commerce best practices
  • Using available metrics and data sources to make decisions on SEO/GEO strategies
  • Comfortable with building and maintaining custom shopify apps using native shopify API’s


Requirements & Qualifications
  • 5+ years of professional web development experience, with 3+ years focused on Shopify / Shopify Plus
  • 1+ years of experience managing, mentoring, or technically leading other developers
  • Expert-level proficiency in Shopify Liquid, HTML5, CSS3/SCSS, and vanilla JavaScript
  • Strong understanding of Shopify’s theme architecture, Online Store 2.0 features, sections, blocks, and metafields
  • Experience with Shopify’s Storefront API, Admin API, and Checkout Extensibility
  • Proficiency with Git version control and CI/CD workflows
  • Solid understanding of responsive design, mobile-first development, and web accessibility standards (WCAG)
  • Experience implementing and debugging analytics tracking (GA4, GTM, Facebook Pixel / CAPI)
  • Demonstrated ability to break down complex projects into clear tasks and delegate effectively
  • Strong communication skills and comfort collaborating cross-functionally with non-technical stakeholders


Nice to Have
  • Experience with headless commerce architectures (e.g., Next.js + Shopify Storefront API)
  • Familiarity with conversion rate optimization tools and A/B testing platforms (e.g., Optimizely, VWO, or Intelligems)
  • Experience with Shopify Flow, Shopify Functions, or Shopify Scripts
  • Knowledge of Python for data scripting, automation, or tooling
  • Familiarity with email marketing platforms (Klaviyo) and their integration with Shopify
  • Experience working with Shopify Markets or international multi-store Shopify setups
  • Interest in AI/LLM-powered commerce and emerging e-commerce technologies
  • Experience with ticketing systems like Clickup or Asana
  • Prior experience in a DTC or high-growth e-commerce environment
  • Experience with automation technologies like Make, Zapier or N8N
  • Experience with the following apps: Metafields Guru, Rebuy Personalization Engine, Matrixify, Inveterate, Bloggle Complete Blog Builder, Histora, Schema Plus for SEO, Hyperspeed, Stockist Store Locator, and Visually | A/B Testing & CRO.

jobs.title: Full-Stack Roblox Engineer (VFX & Front-End)
jobs.description:
Sobre a vaga

We’re hiring a Full-Stack Roblox Engineer (VFX & Front-End) to help lead development on Aura Farm, a live Roblox experience built around collectible gameplay, progression systems, and UGC-style mechanics.


To apply please email your resume to FullStack@CayPlay.com


This role is for someone who can own systems across the entire stack - gameplay logic, backend systems, UI, monetization features, and technical implementation of visual effects.


You’ll work closely with the CayPlay team to expand Aura Farm with new mechanics, progression systems, live updates, and visual polish that keeps the game fresh and competitive in the Roblox ecosystem.


Location / Timezone

Remote - PST to EST time zones preferred


Responsibilities
  • Own engineering across the full Roblox stack using Lua in Roblox Studio
  • Build and expand gameplay systems including item spawning, randomized reward systems, player abilities, progression mechanics, and gameplay interactions
  • Design and maintain backend systems for player data saving, progression tracking, and persistent player stats
  • Implement frontend systems including UI logic, menus, HUDs, and client-server communication
  • Develop and optimize systems supporting live updates, seasonal events, and new gameplay content
  • Integrate animations, sound effects, particle effects, and art assets provided by the team
  • Implement and polish gameplay VFX including aura effects, particles, lighting effects, and satisfying gameplay feedback
  • Collaborate with artists to translate VFX concepts into performant in-game implementations
  • Write modular, scalable, and optimized code that is clean and well-documented
  • Debug and optimize performance across both client and server environments
  • Work closely with the founder and creative leads to refine gameplay loops and progression systems
  • Contribute ideas to game systems, economy balance, and long-term feature development
  • Help define technical direction as the game continues to scale
  • Eventually mentor or guide additional engineers if the team expands
  • Proactively identify risks and propose solutions without requiring constant oversight


Requirements
  • 6+ years of professional Roblox development experience
  • Deep understanding of Roblox’s Lua scripting language and engine capabilities
  • Strong experience building full-stack Roblox systems including gameplay, UI, and backend systems
  • Experience maintaining or expanding live Roblox games with active player bases
  • Proven ability to independently architect and ship complex gameplay systems
  • Strong portfolio or shipped Roblox titles demonstrating polished experiences
  • Clear communicator who thrives in remote, fast-moving teams
  • Passion for games with progression systems and satisfying gameplay loops
  • Comfortable with rapid iteration and frequent content updates
  • Comfortable with Rojo, VS Code and Git-based source control


Bonus Points
  • Experience creating and implementing advanced VFX in Roblox (particles, aura systems, lighting effects, gameplay feedback)
  • Experience collaborating closely with artists to build optimized visual effects
  • Experience implementing analytics, live ops systems, or monetization systems (gamepasses, dev products, etc.)
  • Experience optimizing Roblox games for large player counts and performance

jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer
jobs.description:
Sobre a vaga

Opportunity

We're building critical financial infrastructure in a consolidating market. Recent acquisitions in our space have reached multi-billion dollar valuations, and we're positioned at an interesting inflection point: we're large enough to have proven product-market fit with eight-figure revenue, but small enough that early employees have significant equity ownership and direct influence on the company's direction.


You'll work on production systems that process real financial transactions for thousands of businesses. The technical challenges are significant. We run distributed systems handling regulated financial operations that require both architectural rigor and operational excellence. The problems are hard, the stakes are real, and the learning curve is steep.


We're growing rapidly, and the requirements of strong fundamentals, market timing, and technical scope makes this a unique opportunity to work on impactful infrastructure challenges while having substantial equity participation.


Company Description

We're a lean engineering team building financial infrastructure at scale. Our systems handle credit decisions, payment processing, and KYC/KYB compliance. We build and operate the critical infrastructure that businesses depend on for their financial operations.


Role Description

You'll work on distributed systems with event-driven architecture, maintaining a production monolith while building its microservices replacement under load. Your work will have tangible impact on live systems that businesses rely on daily.


As part of a small team, you'll have direct input on product direction and architectural decisions. You'll collaborate closely with founders and senior engineers, working through complex technical challenges together.


You'll own services end-to-end: API design to database schema to cloud infrastructure to production monitoring.


Qualifications

We're looking for systems thinkers who design for failure, understand distributed systems trade-offs, and write production-grade code. You should be energized by building robust systems in complex domains where production discipline is non-negotiable. If you're interested in working at a rocketship company, on hard technical problems, this could be a strong fit.

jobs.title: Software Engineer
jobs.description:
Sobre a vaga

SecureSalt is building an innovative platform at the intersection of security, commerce, content, and communications. If you want to apply strong engineering fundamentals to real-time challenges in payments infrastructure, machine learning, and security, this role offers the opportunity to contribute immediately and grow quickly.


As a Software Engineer, you will join a small, fast-moving team where your work has a direct impact on our platform and customers. You will learn from experienced engineers and a world-class leadership team, take on meaningful technical ownership early, and help build systems trusted by organizations that depend on secure, intelligent communication.


About SecureSalt

SecureSalt is reimagining email security with machine intelligence and payments infrastructure. Our platform transforms messy inboxes into secure, intelligent command centers by filtering, routing, and validating communication before it reaches users. We solve complex problems involving high-volume data processing, micropayments, dynamic security controls, and deep integration with major email providers.


About the Role

This is an entry-level role, ideal for early-career engineers with 0–2 years of experience who want to build real systems that make a real impact. You will work across design, implementation, deployment, and iteration, gaining exposure to every part of our stack while taking on increasing responsibility.


What You Will Work On
  • Build secure, scalable features for our email processing engine and real-time data systems
  • Contribute to logic for sender validation, intelligent routing, and filtering
  • Maintain integrations with email providers such as Gmail and Google Workspace
  • Participate in code reviews and technical discussions that improve reliability and security


What We’re Looking For
  • A degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or equivalent practical experience
  • Strong fundamentals in algorithms, data structures, and software engineering
  • Hands-on experience with a backend language such as Python, Java, Go, or Rust
  • Curiosity, a builder’s mindset, and a desire to move quickly while maintaining quality
  • Ability to learn fast, communicate clearly, and incorporate feedback
  • Must be legally authorized to work in the United States without sponsorship.


Compensation & Stage

As a lean startup, we strive to align the goals of the team with that of the company. If you join us here at Secure Salt, you will have a sustainable base salary with significant equity upside.


Application Guidelines

This is a full-time position for direct applicants only. We are not engaging recruiting agencies, consultancies, or third-party staffing firms for this role.

Unsolicited outreach from agencies will not receive a response.

SecureSalt is reimagining email security with machine intelligence and payments infrastructure. Our platform transforms messy inboxes into secure, intelligent command centers by filtering, routing, and validating communication before it reaches users. We solve complex problems involving high-volume data processing, micropayments, dynamic security controls, and deep integration with major email providers.


About the Role

This is an entry-level role, ideal for early-career engineers with 0–2 years of experience who want to build real systems that make a real impact. You will work across design, implementation, deployment, and iteration, gaining exposure to every part of our stack while taking on increasing responsibility.


What You Will Work On
  • Build secure, scalable features for our email processing engine and real-time data systems
  • Contribute to logic for sender validation, intelligent routing, and filtering
  • Maintain integrations with email providers such as Gmail and Google Workspace
  • Participate in code reviews and technical discussions that improve reliability and security


What We’re Looking For
  • A degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or equivalent practical experience
  • Strong fundamentals in algorithms, data structures, and software engineering
  • Hands-on experience with a backend language such as Python, Java, Go, or Rust
  • Curiosity, a builder’s mindset, and a desire to move quickly while maintaining quality
  • Ability to learn fast, communicate clearly, and incorporate feedback
  • Must be legally authorized to work in the United States without sponsorship.


Compensation & Stage

As a lean startup, we strive to align the goals of the team with that of the company. If you join us here at Secure Salt, you will have a sustainable base salary with significant equity upside.


Application Guidelines

This is a full-time position for direct applicants only. We are not engaging recruiting agencies, consultancies, or third-party staffing firms for this role.

Unsolicited outreach from agencies will not receive a response.

jobs.title: Back End Developer
jobs.description:
Sobre a vaga

Company Description

SafeHill is a next-generation cybersecurity company founded by ethical hackers to empower organizations with control over their threat exposure landscape. With a mission to identify attack paths before hackers do, SafeHill transforms complex data into actionable insights. Leveraging advanced tools and methodologies, the company delivers unparalleled protection against cybersecurity threats. SafeHill is committed to proactive and innovative solutions in safeguarding businesses worldwide.


Role Description

This is a full-time remote role for a Back End Developer. The Back End Developer will design, build, and maintain scalable server-side applications to support cybersecurity solutions. Day-to-day tasks include implementing APIs, optimizing system performance, ensuring data integrity, and collaborating with front-end developers and the product team. The developer will also participate in code reviews, troubleshoot issues, and continuously improve the development process.


Qualifications
  • Expertise in Back-End Web Development and Software Development
  • Strong understanding of Object-Oriented Programming (OOP)
  • Experience in Front-End Development and integration with back-end systems
  • Proficiency in general Programming concepts and languages
  • Familiarity with cybersecurity principles or related fields is a plus not necessary
  • Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or related field
  • Ability to work collaboratively in a remote team environment
  • Best suited for individuals wanting to grow into a leadership role
  • Remote job meaning self driven is a must

jobs.title: Software Engineer Intern (Open Source)
jobs.description:
Sobre a vaga

Overview

We are seeking Software Intern to support the testing and validation of FastAPI-based microservices powering an AI platform. This role focuses on ensuring reliability, correctness, and observability across API endpoints that integrate with large language models, orchestration services, and distributed infrastructure.


This is a low-time-commitment, unpaid volunteer role intended for individuals looking to gain hands-on experience with real-world AI systems, backend APIs, and collaborative engineering workflows.Key Responsibilities
  • Test FastAPI endpoints for correctness, stability, and schema compliance
  • Validate request and response payloads using Pydantic models
  • Verify correct HTTP status codes, error handling, and edge-case behavior
  • Perform manual and basic automated API testing using tools such as Postman, curl, or pytest
  • Test AI-related endpoints integrating with LLMs (Ollama, OpenAI, LangChain, RAG pipelines)
  • Validate system behavior during partial failures, timeouts, and degraded conditions
  • Perform basic performance and responsiveness checks on API endpoints
  • Review logs to ensure errors are observable and traceable
  • Document bugs clearly with reproducible steps and expected behavior
  • Collaborate asynchronously with engineers via GitHub issues and pull requests


GPU & Local Environment Expectations

While there are no strict hardware requirements, contributors are strongly encouraged to have access to a capable GPU to effectively test local AI models.


Recommended (not required):
  • NVIDIA GPU with at least 8 GB VRAM (RTX 2070 / RTX 3060 or equivalent)
  • Ability to run local LLMs via Ollama or similar runtimes
  • CUDA-capable environment for basic model inference testing


Contributors without a GPU may still participate, but access to local model inference is a significant advantage for testing AI-related endpoints and workflows.


Required Qualifications
  • Basic understanding of REST APIs and HTTP concepts
  • Familiarity with Python, FastAPI, and Docker
  • Proficiency in Git basics
  • Understanding of JSON request/response structures
  • Comfort testing APIs manually
  • Ability to reason about edge cases and failure scenarios
  • Ability to use AI to unblock themselves


Preferred Qualifications
  • Experience with pytest or automated API testing
  • Familiarity with Pydantic, OpenAPI, or Swagger
  • Basic experience with Docker or containerized environments
  • Exposure to AI/ML systems or LLM-based APIs
  • Experience reviewing logs and debugging backend behavior


What You’ll Gain
  • Hands-on experience testing production-style FastAPI services
  • Exposure to AI system failures / reliability challenges
  • Experience with working in the SDLC
  • Experience working with LLM-powered APIs and local model runtimes
  • Real-world public Git collaboration (issues, PRs, code reviews, QA testing)
  • Public representation and endorsements from peers and organizers
  • Resume reviews and mock interviews
  • Practical understanding of QA in distributed AI systems

jobs.title: WebMaster - Wordpress, PHP, HTML/CSS, Content Development, AI Oriented SEO
jobs.description:
Sobre a vaga

This is a Remote Contract Position


You should be able to work independently (without any hand holding)


As a Webmaster, you would be handling various aspects of the Website, handling Wordpress, Content Development.


You should be able to write blog posts, web content, social media, newsletters, video content, as well as technical content. To be successful in this job role, you should adhere to all the AI oriented SEO practices.


Formatting the content in the content management system will be a mandatory task. You should have strong experience with web development as well as Search Engine Optimization. You must know things like cPanel, hosting, wordpress admin well.


You should also possess great communication skills, phenomenal presentation skills, and the ability to pay close attention to detail.

In addition to this, you should perform thorough research before creating innovative content.


Qualification: Must have Technical qualification / Tech Savvy / Tech Enthusiast. This needs you to be very familiar with AI, 5G, Wireless, Semiconductor, Embedded, IoT.

jobs.title: Senior Full Stack Developer (NestJS/GraphQL)
jobs.description:
Sobre a vaga

Optomi, in partnership with a global leader in hospitality, is seeking Senior Engineers to design and build APIs to support all of their brands and enhance their current presence. You will be advancing the API ecosystem and driving the development of custom solutions with a team of engineers building out these applications in NodeJS, ReactJS, GraphQL, and TypeScript. The ideal candidate should have a solid understanding of full-stack solutions and experience in leading IT projects and working closely with stakeholders and business teams. The candidate should be flexible and an engaging team player.


Would you like to work for a high-tech company that...
  • Develops highly visible software solutions with cutting edge technology
  • Wants you to grow within their organization long term
  • Sets the standard for hotel and lodging applications at a global scale


Apply today if your background includes:
  • 5+ years of experience building APIs with NodeJS/TypeScript
  • Experience building React.js application front ends
  • Experience with NodeJS, NestJS, GraphQL, NX
  • Exposure to cloud-native technologies (Azure, AWS, GCP)
  • Experience with Web Sockets and GraphQL Subscriptions for real-time data communication
  • Deep understanding of NestJS and its application in building Apollo Federation Subgraphs


The goal of the developer is to:
  • Design and implement product features including reusable components, frameworks, and libraries in collaboration with business and IT stakeholders
  • Utilize NodeJS/NestJS to build a digital platform from the ground up
  • Write robust, highly performant and testable, well-crafted code

jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer - REMOTE - Unicorn $1bn Val - SaaS
jobs.description:
Sobre a vaga

Senior Software Engineer (Full-Stack)

Hiring across Software Engineer → Senior → Staff level


📍 Remote: US or Canada

💰 Salary: $200k – $300k base + strong equity

🦄 Stage: Series C | $1B+ valuation (unicorn)


Why this opportunity stands out
  • Join a $1B+ product-led SaaS company used by thousands of real-world businesses
  • Work on 0→1 product initiatives while the company continues to scale
  • Small engineering teams with real ownership and influence
  • Strong revenue growth with long-term ambition


Tech stack
  • TypeScript across the stack
  • React / Next.js / Vue
  • Node.js
  • MongoDB
  • Some Kotlin too!


What you’ll be working on
  • Building and shipping new products and features end-to-end
  • Working across the stack in a modern TypeScript-first environment
  • Collaborating closely with product and design teams
  • Contributing to architecture and technical direction
  • Mentoring engineers and helping maintain a high bar for engineering quality


Why engineers tend to like this team
  • Engineers work closely with product and users
  • Strong ownership of the systems and features you build
  • Fast-moving, product-led engineering culture
  • Opportunity to help shape technical direction as the company grows


You’d likely be a good fit if you
  • Have ~5+ years of professional software engineering experience
  • Have strong full-stack experience (or backend leaning with some frontend exposure)
  • Enjoy working in fast-moving product environments
  • Care about engineering quality and long-term maintainability
  • Are a strong communicator who enjoys collaborating across teams


Location & flexibility
  • Fully remote across the US or Canada (excluding Quebec)
  • Optional in-person collaboration near San Francisco
  • Visa support available in exceptional cases


Compensation

💰 $200k–$300k base salary depending on level

📈 Generous pre-IPO equity

🩺 Full benefits


If you're a Software Engineer / Senior Engineer / Staff Engineer who enjoys ownership and building products that real customers rely on, I’d be happy to share more details.


Senior Software Engineer (Full-Stack) - TypeScript, Node, React, Kotlin, Microservices, JavaScript, Next.js, Postgres, AWS

jobs.title: Full-stack Software Engineers – Build Scalable Systems at a High‑Growth Health Tech Startup $200k+
jobs.description:
Sobre a vaga

Software Engineers – Build Scalable Systems at a High‑Growth Health Tech Startup $200k+


Venchr is partnered with a rapidly scaling health‑tech startup that is redefining how cutting‑edge technology can improve patient outcomes around the world. As they enter an ambitious new phase of product expansion, they’re looking to hire two to three exceptional full‑stack engineers who want to work at the intersection of technical excellence and meaningful real‑world impact.


These roles offer total compensation packages of $200k+, reflecting the calibre and influence of the engineers they want onboard.


As a full‑stack engineer, you’ll work across the systems that power their platform end‑to‑end.

On the backend, Python drives their core services as the platform scales and becomes increasingly complex.


On the frontend, you’ll help craft elegant, intuitive user interfaces using TypeScript and React, ensuring complex data and workflows surface in ways that feel clean, fast and intuitive for clinicians and operational teams.


A growing part of their product ecosystem also involves building high‑performance Chrome extensions, enabling users to access critical functionality directly within their existing workflows. Experience developing secure, performant browser extensions or the desire to quickly learn will be a strong advantage.


You’ll ship features across the entire lifecycle from deep backend logic to polished UI and browser‑based tooling with autonomy to influence system design, architecture, and technical direction. Your work will help shape resilient services, smooth data flows, and user experiences that directly improve patient outcomes.


If you want to use your engineering talent to build something that matters, if you enjoy being surrounded by curious people who love solving hard problems, and if you’re looking for a role where your voice genuinely shapes the future, this will feel like the right kind of challenge. This is a place where great engineering genuinely moves the needle.


To have a conversation or learn more, feel free to reach out. We’d love to hear from you.


Venchr is an equal‑opportunity employer. We do not discriminate based on age, disability, gender reassignment, marriage and civil partnership, pregnancy, race, religion or belief, sex, or sexual orientation. All applicants will receive consideration for employment based on their talent, skillset and individual merit alone.

jobs.title: Software Engineer
jobs.description:
Sobre a vaga

Title: Software Engineer

Location: Bethesda, MD (remote)

Type: Contract

Our direct client is seeking a highly skilled Software Engineer who will develop features and improvements to products in a secure, well-tested, and performant way.
  • Key Accountabilities
  • Work with Product Management and other stakeholders (backend, UX, etc.) to iterate on new features.
  • Write code that meets our internal standards for style, maintainability, and best practices for a high-scale web environment.
  • Maintain and advocate for these standards through code review.
  • Learn, collaborate, and teach other Software Engineers.
  • Identify areas of improvements in the code base, both specific to your group and outside your group (e.g. component library) and help contribute to make it better.
  • Other related duties as assigned.
  • Required Skills:
  • Technical / science Bachelor's degree or equivalent experience is required.
  • 4+ years of work-related experience.
  • Professional experience with React and Node.js is required, along with strong proficiency in Next.js for frontend development and Nest.js for backend services.
  • Experience with web application development.
  • Experience with Git and CI/CD.
  • Understanding of DevOps processes and appreciation for the value technologies like Serverless and Kubernetes bring to the software deployment and development process.
  • A solid understanding in core web and browser concepts.
  • A solid understanding of HTML, CSS, and core JavaScript concepts.
  • A solid understanding of relational data and / or non-relational models.
  • Experience with performance and optimization problems and a demonstrated ability to both diagnose and prevent these problems.
  • Experience with the Spring Framework may be needed to support and enhance existing Java-based services and integrations.
  • Strong communication skills, both verbal and written.
  • Ability to regularly achieve consensus with peers and provide clear status updates.
  • Positive and solution-oriented mindset.
  • An inclination towards communication, inclusion, and visibility.
  • Self-motivated and self-managing, with great organizational skills.
  • Comfort working in a highly agile, intensely iterative software development process.
  • Ability to thrive in a geographically distributed organization.
  • Tech startup experience.
  • Enterprise software company experience.
  • Product company experience.
  • Experience working with a remote team.
  • Developer platform / tool industry experience.
  • Experience working with a global or otherwise multicultural team.

Partner's Consulting is an award-winning IT Consulting and Recruiting firm based in the Philadelphia area. We've built personal relationships with our clients over many years and work directly with decision makers on all open positions. Our core values are focused on the highest level of professional dedication to our client's requirements coupled with our desire to partner with highly qualified talent for joint success.

#prt123

R-66

jobs.title: Full Stack Engineer
jobs.description:
Sobre a vaga

A fast-growing fintech company is looking for an Full Stack Web Developer (backend focus) to help build the real-time systems powering the future of capital markets. You’ll work on production-grade software used by active customers, alongside a sharp, collaborative engineering team.


What You’ll Do

Build and scale high-performance, real-time transactional systems

Develop backend (and occasional frontend) features using Node, TypeScript, and React

Design cloud-native systems built for speed, reliability, and scale

Ship multiple customer-facing products with a tight-knit team

Own systems end-to-end, from design to production

Solve complex performance and reliability challenges


What You Bring

5–7+ years of experience shipping production web applications

Strong expertise in Node, TypeScript, React, and modern web development

Hands-on experience with cloud infrastructure and real-time systems

Proven ability to build, optimize, and scale high-volume services

Clear communicator with strong ownership and collaboration skills


Nice to Have

Experience in fintech, trading, or market data systems

Background in high-availability or low-latency environments

Experience with Python, Rust, Go, or C#


If you want to build fast, scalable systems where your work has real impact, this is the role.

What You Bring

5–7+ years of experience shipping production web applications

Strong expertise in Node, TypeScript, React, and modern web development

Hands-on experience with cloud infrastructure and real-time systems

Proven ability to build, optimize, and scale high-volume services

Clear communicator with strong ownership and collaboration skills


Nice to Have

Experience in fintech, trading, or market data systems

Background in high-availability or low-latency environments

Experience with Python, Rust, Go, or C#


If you want to build fast, scalable systems where your work has real impact, this is the role.

jobs.title: Software Engineer
jobs.description:
Sobre a vaga

Join a National Top Workplace

Named a Top Workplace in the USA and Top Remote Workplace, Kobie is where the best minds in loyalty come together, driven by passion and innovation. We’re always looking for talented individuals who are ready to join a collaborative, growth-focused culture. As a partner to some of the world’s most recognized brands, we are leaders in loyalty, helping brands build lasting emotional connections with their consumers.

Join Us from Anywhere

While our headquarters are nestled in sunny St. Petersburg, Florida, Kobie embraces a flexible work environment, offering teammates the freedom to work remotely. We understand the importance of work-life balance and support our team with:

  • Flexible Time Off to recharge when needed
  • Nine Company-Wide Holidays
  • A diverse suite of benefits prioritizing your growth, development, and personal well-being

Benefits

Discover more about our perks and benefits here.

Kobie is a values-led organization where we believe that everyone is a leader, regardless of their position or role.

How You Will Make An Impact
  • Participate in all phases of Agile methodology (planning, grooming, coding sprint items)
  • Gain knowledge and control of our loyalty platform integration points (live API's, Batch, Queue based processing)
  • Participate in design sessions; work with product owners and team members to solve acceptance criteria
  • Build and maintain all configuration and business logic rule documentation
  • Assist other team members through coaching and mentoring
  • Promote and demonstrate good coding practice and patterns for the team
  • Set accurate time estimates and scope of work for tasks and/or projects assigned to you
  • Fill information gaps as needed to accomplish gaps
  • Develop simple solutions to complex problems
  • Suggest innovative new ways to improve processes and/or components of work
  • Effectively work with other groups and third parties

What You Need To Be Successful
  • 3+ years of experience designing and developing applications and components using Java and Spring (Prefer JDK 11+ with Spring Boot)
  • 3+ years of experience in front-end web application development
  • 1+ years of experience designing and developing applications using Angular (Prefer version 10+)
  • 1+ years of experience developing RESTful services using JSON
  • Experience developing microservice cloud applications (Oracle, AWS, or Azure)
  • 1+ years of experience developing SQL multi-table queries, inserts, and updates (Prefer Oracle / PostgreSQL)
  • Experience tuning SQL statements with execution explain plans
  • Familiarity with Agile (e.g., Scrum Process)
  • Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science or related field is preferred
  • Experience developing Loyalty, Accounting, or Banking applications
  • Message Queues (RabbitMQ, ActiveMQ, Kafka Streams)
  • Building Docker containers and configuring Kubernetes clusters (kubectl, Docker for Desktop)
  • Build Management tools (Bitbucket/Git, Gradle, Bamboo)

Who we are As a trusted partner, Kobie delivers market-leading, end-to-end loyalty solutions designed to enable customer experiences for the world's most successful brands. We do this with a strategy-led technology approach that uncovers the truth behind what drives consumers on an emotional level. We believe that our team's passion and expertise are the driving forces behind our success and are proud to be named a Top Workplaces in the USA, where the best and brightest in loyalty drive our mission of growing enterprise value through loyalty.

A place for all We celebrate and embrace diversity at Kobie!

Employment at Kobie is based solely on an individual's merit and qualifications, which are directly related to professional competence. We do not discriminate against any teammate or applicant because of race,color, religion, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity/expression, national origin, disability, age, genetic information, veteran status, marital status, pregnancy, or any other characteristic protected by applicable law.

We are fiercely committed to fostering a workplace where teammates can bring their authentic selves to work every day. Our DEI initiatives, including various committees, ensure that principles of equity, diversity, and inclusion are deeply ingrained throughout Kobie. While our leadership team fully supports our policy of nondiscrimination and equal opportunity, it is the responsibility of all teammates to uphold these values.

Ready to join us? If you’re ready to make an impact and grow in a supportive, innovative environment, we’d love to hear from you. Apply today and join the best and brightest in loyalty!

We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer
jobs.description:
Sobre a vaga

Senior Software Engineer

AI & Real-Time Systems

Up to $200,000 base (DOE) + 10-30% performance bonus + equity

Remote (USA)


We’re partnering with a fast-growing, AI-driven tech business that’s building a real customer data platform for advertising - not a website, but a core piece of enterprise infrastructure that powers highly personalized, automated marketing for major brands and retailers. They’re scaling fast and tackling serious technical complexity!


They’re looking for a Senior Software Engineer who knows how to build actual products at scale - the kind that process huge volumes of data, run in real time, and sit behind mission-critical systems. You’ll work on event-driven architecture, high-throughput services, and APIs that enable AI systems to make smart, automated decisions.


What you’d be working on:
  • Building scalable, AI-first campaign management systems
  • Designing low-latency bidding and optimization services
  • Creating real-time data pipelines (Kafka / streaming tech)
  • Embedding privacy, governance, and compliance into the platform
  • Shipping modern APIs and tooling for internal teams and partners


What they’re looking for:
  • 5+ years building distributed, event-driven backend systems
  • Strong experience with TypeScript / Node.js and Kubernetes
  • Hands-on with streaming data platforms (Kafka, Flink, etc.)
  • Strong systems design skills in cloud-native environments
  • Experience building real, production-grade products (not just apps or websites)
  • Start-up background is highly desirable
  • Bonus points if you’ve worked in ad tech, martech, or data-heavy platforms


💰 Comp: up to $200,000 base + 10–30% performance bonus + equity/options


If you love deep technical problems, real-time data, and shipping impactful products - this could be a brilliant move.


Interview Process:
  • Quick resume walkthrough with the founder
  • Traditional interview with Head of Engineering
  • Take-home exercise followed by a discussion - focused on ways of working and approach
